```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import React, { useState } from 'react';
     4→import Link from 'next/link';
     5→import { usePathname, useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
     6→import Image from 'next/image';
     7→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     8→import { Users, Megaphone, Crown, List, Building2, PanelLeftClose, PanelLeftOpen, Settings, LogOut, Shield, MessageSquare, Zap, User, FileText, ClipboardList, Sliders, DollarSign, TrendingUp, Handshake, UserPlus, Archive, Sparkles, Link2, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, BookOpen, CheckCircle, Briefcase, ListTodo, Target, Inbox, Calendar } from 'lucide-react';
     9→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    10→import { useChangelog } from '@/contexts/ChangelogContext';
    11→import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuSeparator } from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu';
    12→import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
    13→import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogDescription } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    14→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
    15→import { ScrollArea } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area';
    16→
    17→interface SidebarProps {
    18→  children: React.ReactNode;
    19→}
    20→
    21→export default function Sidebar({ children }: SidebarProps) {
    22→  const pathname = usePathname();
    23→  const router = useRouter();
    24→  const { userProfile, signOut } = useAuth();
    25→  const [isSidebarCollapsed, setIsSidebarCollapsed] = React.useState(() => {
    26→    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    27→      const stored = localStorage.getItem('sidebarCollapsed');
    28→      return stored === 'true';
    29→    }
    30→    return false;
    31→  });
    32→  const [isChangelogOpen, setIsChangelogOpen] = useState(false);
    33→  const [changelogPage, setChangelogPage] = useState(0);
    34→  const changelogsPerPage = 3;
    35→
    36→  // Get changelog data from context (fetched once at app level)
    37→  const { changelogs, latestVersion } = useChangelog();
    38→
    39→  // Format date for changelog display
    40→  const formatChangelogDate = (dateString: string | null) => {
    41→    if (!dateString) return '';
    42→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    43→      year: 'numeric',
    44→      month: 'long',
    45→      day: 'numeric'
    46→    });
    47→  };
    48→
    49→  // Render changelog content
    50→  const renderChangelogContent = (content: string) => {
    51→    return content.split('\n').map((line, index) => {
    52→      if (line.trim().startsWith('- ') || line.trim().startsWith('* ')) {
    53→        return (
    54→          <li key={index} className="ml-4 text-gray-700 text-sm">
    55→            {line.trim().substring(2)}
    56→          </li>
    57→        );
    58→      }
    59→      if (line.trim().startsWith('### ')) {
    60→        return (
    61→          <h4 key={index} className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mt-3 mb-1 text-sm">
    62→            {line.trim().substring(4)}
    63→          </h4>
    64→        );
    65→      }
    66→      if (line.trim().startsWith('## ')) {
    67→        return (
    68→          <h3 key={index} className="font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4 mb-2 text-sm">
    69→            {line.trim().substring(3)}
    70→          </h3>
    71→        );
    72→      }
    73→      if (line.trim() === '') {
    74→        return <div key={index} className="h-2" />;
    75→      }
    76→      return (
    77→        <p key={index} className="text-gray-700 text-sm">
    78→          {line}
    79→        </p>
    80→      );
    81→    });
    82→  };
    83→
    84→  const handleSidebarToggle = () => {
    85→    setIsSidebarCollapsed(prev => {
    86→      localStorage.setItem('sidebarCollapsed', String(!prev));
    87→      return !prev;
    88→    });
    89→  };
    90→
    91→  // Helper function to get user initials
    92→  const getUserInitials = () => {
    93→    if (userProfile?.name) {
    94→      return userProfile.name
    95→        .split(' ')
    96→        .map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase())
    97→        .join('')
    98→        .slice(0, 2);
    99→    }
   100→    return userProfile?.email?.charAt(0).toUpperCase() || 'U';
   101→  };
   102→
   103→  return (
   104→    <div className="h-screen bg-gray-50 flex flex-col">
   105→      {/* Header */}
   106→      <header className="bg-white border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-2 flex-shrink-0">
   107→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   108→          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
   109→            <div className="flex items-center">
   110→              <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={36} height={36} />
   111→              <span className="ml-2 text-xl font-semibold text-gray-800">Holo Hive</span>
   112→              {latestVersion && (
   113→                <Badge
   114→                  variant="secondary"
   115→                  className="ml-2 cursor-pointer bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#3e8692]/20 transition-colors"
   116→                  onClick={() => setIsChangelogOpen(true)}
   117→                >
   118→                  v{latestVersion}
   119→                </Badge>
   120→              )}
   121→            </div>
   122→          </div>
   123→          <div className="flex items-center space-x-4">
   124→              <DropdownMenu>
   125→              <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
   126→                <Button
   127→                  variant="ghost"
   128→                  className="h-8 w-8 p-0 rounded-full hover:bg-transparent active:bg-transparent focus:bg-transparent focus-visible:ring-0 data-[state=open]:bg-transparent"
   129→                >
   130→                  <Avatar className="h-8 w-8">
   131→                    {userProfile?.profile_photo_url ? (
   132→                      <AvatarImage src={userProfile.profile_photo_url} alt={userProfile?.name || userProfile?.email || 'User'} />
   133→                    ) : null}
   134→                    <AvatarFallback className="bg-gray-200 text-gray-800 text-xs font-semibold">
   135→                      {getUserInitials()}
   136→                    </AvatarFallback>
   137→                  </Avatar>
   138→                </Button>
   139→              </DropdownMenuTrigger>
   140→              <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
   141→                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={() => router.push('/settings')}>
   142→                  <Settings className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   143→                  Settings
   144→                </DropdownMenuItem>
   145→                <DropdownMenuSeparator />
   146→                <DropdownMenuItem onClick={signOut}>
   147→                  <LogOut className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   148→                  Sign out
   149→                </DropdownMenuItem>
   150→              </DropdownMenuContent>
   151→            </DropdownMenu>
   152→          </div>
   153→        </div>
   154→      </header>
   155→      <div className="flex flex-1 overflow-hidden">
   156→        {/* Sidebar */}
   157→        <aside className={`${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'w-16' : 'w-64'} bg-white border-r border-gray-200 flex-shrink-0 transition-all duration-300 ease-in-out`}>
   158→          <div className="flex flex-col h-full">
   159→            {/* Navigation */}
   160→            <nav className="p-4 space-y-4 flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
   161→              {/* Holo GPT - Top of sidebar */}
   162→              <div className="space-y-2">
   163→                <Link href="/chat" legacyBehavior>
   164→                  <Button
   165→                    asChild
   166→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/chat') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   167→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   168→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/chat') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   169→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Holo GPT' : undefined}
   170→                  >
   171→                    <span>
   172→                      <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   173→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Holo GPT'}
   174→                    </span>
   175→                  </Button>
   176→                </Link>
   177→              </div>
   178→
   179→              {/* People Section */}
   180→              {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   181→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   182→                  <User className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   183→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   184→                </div>
   185→              )}
   186→              <div className="space-y-2">
   187→                {/* Team tab */}
   188→                <Link href="/team" legacyBehavior>
   189→                  <Button
   190→                    asChild
   191→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/team') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   192→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   193→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/team') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   194→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Team' : undefined}
   195→                  >
   196→                    <span>
   197→                      <Shield className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   198→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Team'}
   199→                    </span>
   200→                  </Button>
   201→                </Link>
   202→                {/* Clients tab */}
   203→                <Link href="/clients" legacyBehavior>
   204→                  <Button
   205→                    asChild
   206→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/clients') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   207→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   208→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/clients') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   209→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Clients' : undefined}
   210→                  >
   211→                    <span>
   212→                      <Users className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   213→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Clients'}
   214→                    </span>
   215→                  </Button>
   216→                </Link>
   217→              </div>
   218→
   219→              {/* KOLs Section */}
   220→              {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   221→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   222→                  <Crown className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   223→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   224→                </div>
   225→              )}
   226→              <div className="space-y-2">
   227→                {/* KOLs tab */}
   228→                <Link href="/kols" legacyBehavior>
   229→                  <Button
   230→                    asChild
   231→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/kols') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   232→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   233→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/kols') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   234→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'KOLs' : undefined}
   235→                  >
   236→                    <span>
   237→                      <Crown className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   238→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'KOLs'}
   239→                    </span>
   240→                  </Button>
   241→                </Link>
   242→                {/* Lists tab */}
   243→                <Link href="/lists" legacyBehavior>
   244→                  <Button
   245→                    asChild
   246→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/lists') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   247→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   248→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/lists') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   249→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Lists' : undefined}
   250→                  >
   251→                    <span>
   252→                      <List className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   253→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Lists'}
   254→                    </span>
   255→                  </Button>
   256→                </Link>
   257→                {/* Campaigns tab */}
   258→                <Link href="/campaigns" legacyBehavior>
   259→                  <Button
   260→                    asChild
   261→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/campaigns') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   262→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   263→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/campaigns') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   264→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Campaigns' : undefined}
   265→                  >
   266→                    <span>
   267→                      <Megaphone className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   268→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Campaigns'}
   269→                    </span>
   270→                  </Button>
   271→                </Link>
   272→              </div>
   273→
   274→              {/* CRM Section */}
   275→              {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   276→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   277→                  <DollarSign className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   278→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   279→                </div>
   280→              )}
   281→              <div className="space-y-2">
   282→                {/* Sales Pipeline tab */}
   283→                <Link href="/crm/sales-pipeline" legacyBehavior>
   284→                  <Button
   285→                    asChild
   286→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/sales-pipeline') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   287→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   288→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/sales-pipeline') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   289→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Sales' : undefined}
   290→                  >
   291→                    <span>
   292→                      <Target className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   293→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Sales'}
   294→                    </span>
   295→                  </Button>
   296→                </Link>
   297→                {/* Network tab */}
   298→                <Link href="/crm/network" legacyBehavior>
   299→                  <Button
   300→                    asChild
   301→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/network') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   302→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   303→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/network') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   304→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Network' : undefined}
   305→                  >
   306→                    <span>
   307→                      <Handshake className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   308→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Network'}
   309→                    </span>
   310→                  </Button>
   311→                </Link>
   312→                {/* Contacts tab */}
   313→                <Link href="/crm/contacts" legacyBehavior>
   314→                  <Button
   315→                    asChild
   316→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/contacts') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   317→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   318→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/contacts') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   319→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Contacts' : undefined}
   320→                  >
   321→                    <span>
   322→                      <UserPlus className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   323→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Contacts'}
   324→                    </span>
   325→                  </Button>
   326→                </Link>
   327→                {/* Submissions tab */}
   328→                <Link href="/crm/submissions" legacyBehavior>
   329→                  <Button
   330→                    asChild
   331→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/submissions') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   332→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   333→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/submissions') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   334→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Submissions' : undefined}
   335→                  >
   336→                    <span>
   337→                      <Inbox className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   338→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Submissions'}
   339→                    </span>
   340→                  </Button>
   341→                </Link>
   342→                {/* Meetings tab */}
   343→                <Link href="/crm/meetings" legacyBehavior>
   344→                  <Button
   345→                    asChild
   346→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/meetings') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   347→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   348→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/meetings') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   349→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Meetings' : undefined}
   350→                  >
   351→                    <span>
   352→                      <Calendar className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   353→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Meetings'}
   354→                    </span>
   355→                  </Button>
   356→                </Link>
   357→                {/* Telegram Chats tab - Super Admin only */}
   358→                {userProfile?.role === 'super_admin' && (
   359→                  <Link href="/crm/telegram" legacyBehavior>
   360→                    <Button
   361→                      asChild
   362→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/crm/telegram') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   363→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   364→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/crm/telegram') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   365→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'TG Chats' : undefined}
   366→                    >
   367→                      <span>
   368→                        <MessageSquare className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   369→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'TG Chats'}
   370→                      </span>
   371→                    </Button>
   372→                  </Link>
   373→                )}
   374→              </div>
   375→
   376→              {/* Workspace Section - only visible to Andy (testing) */}
   377→              {userProfile?.email === 'andy@holohive.io' && (
   378→                <>
   379→                  {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   380→                    <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   381→                      <Briefcase className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   382→                      <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   383→                    </div>
   384→                  )}
   385→                  <div className="space-y-2">
   386→                    {/* Daily Stand-Up tab */}
   387→                    <Link href="/daily-standup" legacyBehavior>
   388→                      <Button
   389→                        asChild
   390→                        variant={pathname.startsWith('/daily-standup') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   391→                        className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   392→                        style={pathname.startsWith('/daily-standup') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   393→                        title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Daily Stand-Up' : undefined}
   394→                      >
   395→                        <span>
   396→                          <CheckCircle className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   397→                          {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Daily Stand-Up'}
   398→                        </span>
   399→                      </Button>
   400→                    </Link>
   401→                    {/* Tasks tab */}
   402→                    <Link href="/tasks" legacyBehavior>
   403→                      <Button
   404→                        asChild
   405→                        variant={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   406→                        className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   407→                        style={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   408→                        title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Tasks' : undefined}
   409→                      >
   410→                        <span>
   411→                          <ListTodo className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   412→                          {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Tasks'}
   413→                        </span>
   414→                      </Button>
   415→                    </Link>
   416→                  </div>
   417→                </>
   418→              )}
   419→
   420→              {/* Documents Section */}
   421→              {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   422→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   423→                  <FileText className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   424→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   425→                </div>
   426→              )}
   427→              <div className="space-y-2">
   428→                {/* Delivery Logs tab */}
   429→                <Link href="/delivery-logs" legacyBehavior>
   430→                  <Button
   431→                    asChild
   432→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/delivery-logs') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   433→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   434→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/delivery-logs') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   435→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Delivery Logs' : undefined}
   436→                  >
   437→                    <span>
   438→                      <ClipboardList className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   439→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Delivery Logs'}
   440→                    </span>
   441→                  </Button>
   442→                </Link>
   443→                {/* Forms tab - Admin only */}
   444→                {(userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin') && (
   445→                  <Link href="/forms" legacyBehavior>
   446→                    <Button
   447→                      asChild
   448→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/forms') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   449→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   450→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/forms') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   451→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Forms' : undefined}
   452→                    >
   453→                      <span>
   454→                        <ClipboardList className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   455→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Forms'}
   456→                      </span>
   457→                    </Button>
   458→                  </Link>
   459→                )}
   460→                {/* Links tab */}
   461→                <Link href="/links" legacyBehavior>
   462→                  <Button
   463→                    asChild
   464→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/links') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   465→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   466→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/links') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   467→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Links' : undefined}
   468→                  >
   469→                    <span>
   470→                      <Link2 className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   471→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Links'}
   472→                    </span>
   473→                  </Button>
   474→                </Link>
   475→                {/* Templates tab */}
   476→                <Link href="/templates" legacyBehavior>
   477→                  <Button
   478→                    asChild
   479→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/templates') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   480→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   481→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/templates') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   482→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Templates' : undefined}
   483→                  >
   484→                    <span>
   485→                      <MessageSquare className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   486→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Templates'}
   487→                    </span>
   488→                  </Button>
   489→                </Link>
   490→                {/* SOPs tab - Admin only */}
   491→                {(userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin') && (
   492→                  <Link href="/sops" legacyBehavior>
   493→                    <Button
   494→                      asChild
   495→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/sops') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   496→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   497→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/sops') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   498→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'SOPs' : undefined}
   499→                    >
   500→                      <span>
   501→                        <BookOpen className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   502→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'SOPs'}
   503→                      </span>
   504→                    </Button>
   505→                  </Link>
   506→                )}
   507→              </div>
   508→
   509→              {/* Admin Section */}
   510→              {!isSidebarCollapsed && (
   511→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   512→                  <Settings className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   513→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   514→                </div>
   515→              )}
   516→              <div className="space-y-2">
   517→                {/* Field Options tab */}
   518→                <Link href="/admin/field-options" legacyBehavior>
   519→                  <Button
   520→                    asChild
   521→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/admin/field-options') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   522→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   523→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/field-options') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   524→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Field Options' : undefined}
   525→                  >
   526→                    <span>
   527→                      <Sliders className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   528→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Field Options'}
   529→                    </span>
   530→                  </Button>
   531→                </Link>
   532→                {/* Changelog tab - Super Admin only */}
   533→                {userProfile?.role === 'super_admin' && (
   534→                  <Link href="/admin/changelog" legacyBehavior>
   535→                    <Button
   536→                      asChild
   537→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   538→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   539→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   540→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Changelog' : undefined}
   541→                    >
   542→                      <span>
   543→                        <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   544→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Changelog'}
   545→                      </span>
   546→                    </Button>
   547→                  </Link>
   548→                )}
   549→                {/* Archive tab */}
   550→                <Link href="/archive" legacyBehavior>
   551→                  <Button
   552→                    asChild
   553→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   554→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   555→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   556→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Archive' : undefined}
   557→                  >
   558→                    <span>
   559→                      <Archive className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   560→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Archive'}
   561→                    </span>
   562→                  </Button>
   563→                </Link>
   564→              </div>
   565→
   566→            </nav>
   567→            {/* Collapse Button at Bottom */}
   568→            <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-200">
   569→              <div className="flex justify-center">
   570→                <Button
   571→                  variant="ghost"
   572→                  size="sm"
   573→                  onClick={handleSidebarToggle}
   574→                  className="hover:bg-gray-100 w-auto px-2"
   575→                  title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Expand sidebar' : 'Collapse sidebar'}
   576→                >
   577→                  {isSidebarCollapsed ? (
   578→                    <PanelLeftOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   579→                  ) : (
   580→                    <PanelLeftClose className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   581→                  )}
   582→                </Button>
   583→              </div>
   584→            </div>
   585→          </div>
   586→        </aside>
   587→        {/* Main Content */}
   588→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">{children}</main>
   589→      </div>
   590→
   591→      {/* Changelog History Dialog */}
   592→      <Dialog open={isChangelogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
   593→        setIsChangelogOpen(open);
   594→        if (open) setChangelogPage(0);
   595→      }}>
   596→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg max-h-[80vh]">
   597→          <DialogHeader>
   598→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   599→              <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
   600→              <DialogTitle className="text-xl">Changelog</DialogTitle>
   601→            </div>
   602→            <DialogDescription>
   603→              Version history and updates
   604→            </DialogDescription>
   605→          </DialogHeader>
   606→          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[50vh] pr-4">
   607→            <div className="space-y-6">
   608→              {changelogs
   609→                .slice(changelogPage * changelogsPerPage, (changelogPage + 1) * changelogsPerPage)
   610→                .map((changelog, idx) => (
   611→                <div key={changelog.id} className={idx > 0 ? 'border-t pt-6' : ''}>
   612→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   613→                    <Badge
   614→                      variant="secondary"
   615→                      className="bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692]"
   616→                    >
   617→                      v{changelog.version}
   618→                    </Badge>
   619→                    {changelog.published_at && (
   620→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   621→                        {formatChangelogDate(changelog.published_at)}
   622→                      </span>
   623→                    )}
   624→                  </div>
   625→                  <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   626→                    {changelog.title}
   627→                  </h3>
   628→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   629→                    {renderChangelogContent(changelog.content)}
   630→                  </div>
   631→                </div>
   632→              ))}
   633→              {changelogs.length === 0 && (
   634→                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
   635→                  No changelogs available yet.
   636→                </p>
   637→              )}
   638→            </div>
   639→          </ScrollArea>
   640→          {changelogs.length > changelogsPerPage && (
   641→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t">
   642→              <Button
   643→                variant="outline"
   644→                size="sm"
   645→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
   646→                disabled={changelogPage === 0}
   647→              >
   648→                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   649→                Previous
   650→              </Button>
   651→              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   652→                Page {changelogPage + 1} of {Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage)}
   653→              </span>
   654→              <Button
   655→                variant="outline"
   656→                size="sm"
   657→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.min(Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1, p + 1))}
   658→                disabled={changelogPage >= Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1}
   659→              >
   660→                Next
   661→                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
   662→              </Button>
   663→            </div>
   664→          )}
   665→        </DialogContent>
   666→      </Dialog>
   667→    </div>
   668→  );
   669→}
```
</details></tool-use>

Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive summary:

## Navigation/Sidebar Analysis Report

Based on my analysis of the Next.js project, here's the complete breakdown of the sidebar navigation:

### File Location
- **Main Component:** `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/Sidebar.tsx`
- **Size:** 669 lines
- **Type:** Client component (`'use client'`)

---

### 1. How Nav Items Are Defined

Nav items are **defined as inline JSX**, NOT as a data array. Each navigation item follows this pattern:

```tsx
<Link href="/tasks" legacyBehavior>
  <Button
    asChild
    variant={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
    style={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Tasks' : undefined}
  >
    <span>
      <ListTodo className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Tasks'}
    </span>
  </Button>
</Link>
```

**Key characteristics:**
- Using Next.js `Link` component with `legacyBehavior`
- shadcn `Button` component as the interactive element
- Icons from `lucide-react`
- Active state based on `pathname.startsWith()` check
- Conditional styling for collapsed/expanded sidebar

---

### 2. How Sub-Navigation Works

**Current State:** The sidebar does NOT currently have expandable/nested sections. All items are flat.

**Available Infrastructure for Expandable Sections:**
The project has a `Collapsible` component available (from shadcn/Radix UI):

```tsx
// Available at: /Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/ui/collapsible.tsx
import { Collapsible, CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent } from '@/components/ui/collapsible';
```

This uses `@radix-ui/react-collapsible` and exposes:
- `Collapsible` (Root container)
- `CollapsibleTrigger` (Clickable header with expand/collapse)
- `CollapsibleContent` (Content that shows/hides)

---

### 3. Where "Tasks" Nav Item is Defined

**Location:** Lines **401-415** in `/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/Sidebar.tsx`

```tsx
{/* Tasks tab */}
<Link href="/tasks" legacyBehavior>
  <Button
    asChild
    variant={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
    style={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Tasks' : undefined}
  >
    <span>
      <ListTodo className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Tasks'}
    </span>
  </Button>
</Link>
```

**Important Context:**
- Tasks is inside a **"Workspace Section"** (lines 376-418)
- This section is **only visible to specific user:** `andy@holohive.io` (line 377)
- The section is gated with: `{userProfile?.email === 'andy@holohive.io' && (...)}`
- Daily Stand-Up is the only other item in this section

---

### 4. How to Add Sub-Items Under Tasks

To add expandable sub-items under Tasks, replace the current Task button with a Collapsible structure:

```tsx
{/* Tasks tab with sub-items */}
<Collapsible>
  <CollapsibleTrigger asChild>
    <Button
      variant={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
      style={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
    >
      <span>
        <ListTodo className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Tasks'}
      </span>
    </Button>
  </CollapsibleTrigger>
  
  <CollapsibleContent className="pl-6 space-y-2 mt-2">
    {/* Sub-item 1 */}
    <Link href="/tasks/dashboards" legacyBehavior>
      <Button
        asChild
        variant={pathname === '/tasks/dashboards' ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
        className="w-full justify-start hover:opacity-90 text-sm"
      >
        <span>Dashboards</span>
      </Button>
    </Link>
    
    {/* Sub-item 2 */}
    <Link href="/tasks/templates" legacyBehavior>
      <Button
        asChild
        variant={pathname === '/tasks/templates' ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
        className="w-full justify-start hover:opacity-90 text-sm"
      >
        <span>Templates</span>
      </Button>
    </Link>
  </CollapsibleContent>
</Collapsible>
```

---

### Navigation Structure Summary

The sidebar is organized into 7 main sections:

1. **Holo GPT** (Chat)
2. **People Section** - Team, Clients
3. **KOLs Section** - KOLs, Lists, Campaigns
4. **CRM Section** - Sales, Network, Contacts, Submissions, Meetings, TG Chats (admin-only)
5. **Workspace Section** (andy@holohive.io only) - Daily Stand-Up, Tasks
6. **Documents Section** - Delivery Logs, Forms (admin-only), Links, Templates, SOPs (admin-only)
7. **Admin Section** - Field Options, Changelog (super-admin), Archive

**Primary Color:** `#3e8692` (teal)
**Collapsible Components Available:** Yes (Radix UI collapsible)
**Current Expandable Pattern:** None - all items are flat links

### Step 3d: Create TaskChecklist and SubtaskList components

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-17 13:37:48Z)**_

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { TaskService, TaskChecklistItem } from '@/lib/taskService';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
import { Plus, Trash2, CheckSquare, Square, ListChecks } from 'lucide-react';

interface TaskChecklistProps {
  taskId: string;
}

export function TaskChecklist({ taskId }: TaskChecklistProps) {
  const { toast } = useToast();
  const [items, setItems] = useState<TaskChecklistItem[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [newItemText, setNewItemText] = useState('');
  const [editingItemId, setEditingItemId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [editText, setEditText] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    loadItems();
  }, [taskId]);

  const loadItems = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await TaskService.getChecklist(taskId);
      setItems(data);
    } catch {
      // silent
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleAdd = async () => {
    if (!newItemText.trim()) return;
    try {
      await TaskService.addChecklistItem(taskId, newItemText.trim(), items.length);
      setNewItemText('');
      await loadItems();
    } catch {
      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to add item.', variant: 'destructive' });
    }
  };

  const handleToggle = async (item: TaskChecklistItem) => {
    // Optimistic update
    setItems(prev => prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, is_done: !i.is_done } : i));
    try {
      await TaskService.toggleChecklistItem(item.id, !item.is_done);
    } catch {
      setItems(prev => prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, is_done: item.is_done } : i));
    }
  };

  const handleEdit = async (itemId: string) => {
    if (!editText.trim()) {
      setEditingItemId(null);
      return;
    }
    try {
      await TaskService.updateChecklistItem(itemId, editText.trim());
      setEditingItemId(null);
      setEditText('');
      await loadItems();
    } catch {
      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to update item.', variant: 'destructive' });
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (itemId: string) => {
    setItems(prev => prev.filter(i => i.id !== itemId));
    try {
      await TaskService.deleteChecklistItem(itemId);
    } catch {
      await loadItems();
    }
  };

  const doneCount = items.filter(i => i.is_done).length;
  const progress = items.length > 0 ? Math.round((doneCount / items.length) * 100) : 0;

  if (loading) {
    return <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 py-2 text-center">Loading checklist...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <ListChecks className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Checklist</h4>
        {items.length > 0 && (
          <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{doneCount}/{items.length}</span>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* Progress bar */}
      {items.length > 0 && (
        <div className="h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
          <div
            className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-300"
            style={{ width: `${progress}%`, backgroundColor: progress === 100 ? '#22c55e' : '#3e8692' }}
          />
        </div>
      )}

      {/* Items */}
      <div className="space-y-1">
        {items.map((item) => (
          <div key={item.id} className="flex items-center gap-2 group py-0.5">
            <button
              onClick={() => handleToggle(item)}
              className="flex-shrink-0 hover:opacity-80"
            >
              {item.is_done ? (
                <CheckSquare className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500" />
              ) : (
                <Square className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 hover:text-gray-500" />
              )}
            </button>
            {editingItemId === item.id ? (
              <Input
                value={editText}
                onChange={(e) => setEditText(e.target.value)}
                onBlur={() => handleEdit(item.id)}
                onKeyDown={(e) => {
                  if (e.key === 'Enter') handleEdit(item.id);
                  if (e.key === 'Escape') { setEditingItemId(null); setEditText(''); }
                }}
                className="flex-1 h-6 text-xs border-none shadow-none p-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0"
                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
                autoFocus
              />
            ) : (
              <span
                className={`flex-1 text-xs cursor-pointer ${item.is_done ? 'line-through text-gray-400' : 'text-gray-700'}`}
                onDoubleClick={() => { setEditingItemId(item.id); setEditText(item.text); }}
              >
                {item.text}
              </span>
            )}
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="h-5 w-5 p-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity hover:bg-red-50"
              onClick={() => handleDelete(item.id)}
            >
              <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3 text-red-400" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Add new item */}
      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
        <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
        <Input
          value={newItemText}
          onChange={(e) => setNewItemText(e.target.value)}
          onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleAdd(); }}
          placeholder="Add checklist item..."
          className="flex-1 h-7 text-xs border-none shadow-none px-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0"
          style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```text
File created successfully at: /Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/components/tasks/TaskChecklist.tsx
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { TaskService, Task } from '@/lib/taskService';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
import {
  Plus,
  Trash2,
  Circle,
  CheckCircle2,
  PauseCircle,
  PlayCircle,
  MessageCircle,
  GitBranch,
} from 'lucide-react';

interface SubtaskListProps {
  parentTaskId: string;
  onSubtaskClick?: (task: Task) => void;
}

const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; icon: typeof Circle; color: string }> = {
  to_do: { label: 'To Do', icon: Circle, color: 'text-gray-400' },
  in_progress: { label: 'In Progress', icon: PlayCircle, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  paused: { label: 'Paused', icon: PauseCircle, color: 'text-amber-500' },
  ready_for_feedback: { label: 'Feedback', icon: MessageCircle, color: 'text-purple-500' },
  complete: { label: 'Complete', icon: CheckCircle2, color: 'text-green-500' },
};

export function SubtaskList({ parentTaskId, onSubtaskClick }: SubtaskListProps) {
  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
  const { toast } = useToast();
  const [subtasks, setSubtasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [adding, setAdding] = useState(false);
  const [newName, setNewName] = useState('');

  useEffect(() => {
    loadSubtasks();
  }, [parentTaskId]);

  const loadSubtasks = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await TaskService.getSubtasks(parentTaskId);
      setSubtasks(data);
    } catch {
      // silent
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleAdd = async () => {
    if (!newName.trim() || !user?.id || !userProfile) return;
    try {
      await TaskService.createTask({
        task_name: newName.trim(),
        parent_task_id: parentTaskId,
        status: 'to_do',
        frequency: 'one-time',
        task_type: 'General',
        created_by: user.id,
        created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
      });
      setNewName('');
      setAdding(false);
      await loadSubtasks();
    } catch {
      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to add subtask.', variant: 'destructive' });
    }
  };

  const handleStatusToggle = async (subtask: Task) => {
    const newStatus = subtask.status === 'complete' ? 'to_do' : 'complete';
    setSubtasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === subtask.id ? { ...t, status: newStatus } : t));
    try {
      await TaskService.updateField(subtask.id, 'status', newStatus);
    } catch {
      await loadSubtasks();
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    setSubtasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
    try {
      await TaskService.deleteTask(id);
    } catch {
      await loadSubtasks();
    }
  };

  const doneCount = subtasks.filter(t => t.status === 'complete').length;

  if (loading) {
    return <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 py-2 text-center">Loading subtasks...</div>;
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-2">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <GitBranch className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
          <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Subtasks</h4>
          {subtasks.length > 0 && (
            <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{doneCount}/{subtasks.length}</span>
          )}
        </div>
        <Button
          variant="ghost"
          size="sm"
          className="h-6 px-2 text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
          onClick={() => setAdding(true)}
        >
          <Plus className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Add
        </Button>
      </div>

      {subtasks.length > 0 && (
        <div className="space-y-0.5">
          {subtasks.map((subtask) => {
            const cfg = STATUS_CONFIG[subtask.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.to_do;
            const Icon = cfg.icon;
            return (
              <div key={subtask.id} className="flex items-center gap-2 py-1 px-1 rounded hover:bg-gray-50 group">
                <button onClick={() => handleStatusToggle(subtask)} className="flex-shrink-0">
                  <Icon className={`h-4 w-4 ${cfg.color}`} />
                </button>
                <span
                  className={`flex-1 text-xs cursor-pointer ${subtask.status === 'complete' ? 'line-through text-gray-400' : 'text-gray-700'}`}
                  onClick={() => onSubtaskClick?.(subtask)}
                >
                  {subtask.task_name}
                </span>
                {subtask.due_date && (
                  <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">
                    {new Date(subtask.due_date + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
                  </span>
                )}
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="sm"
                  className="h-5 w-5 p-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-red-50"
                  onClick={() => handleDelete(subtask.id)}
                >
                  <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3 text-red-400" />
                </Button>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </div>
      )}

      {adding && (
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <Circle className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0" />
          <Input
            value={newName}
            onChange={(e) => setNewName(e.target.value)}
            onBlur={() => { if (!newName.trim()) setAdding(false); else handleAdd(); }}
            onKeyDown={(e) => {
              if (e.key === 'Enter') handleAdd();
              if (e.key === 'Escape') { setAdding(false); setNewName(''); }
            }}
            placeholder="Subtask name..."
            className="flex-1 h-7 text-xs border-none shadow-none px-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0"
            style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
            autoFocus
          />
        </div>
      )}

      {subtasks.length === 0 && !adding && (
        <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 text-center py-1">No subtasks</p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { TaskService, Task, DashboardStats } from '@/lib/taskService';
import {
  LayoutDashboard,
  AlertTriangle,
  Clock,
  CheckCircle2,
  PlayCircle,
  Circle,
  PauseCircle,
  MessageCircle,
} from 'lucide-react';

const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; icon: typeof Circle; color: string }> = {
  to_do: { label: 'To Do', icon: Circle, color: 'text-gray-400' },
  in_progress: { label: 'In Progress', icon: PlayCircle, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  paused: { label: 'Paused', icon: PauseCircle, color: 'text-amber-500' },
  ready_for_feedback: { label: 'Feedback', icon: MessageCircle, color: 'text-purple-500' },
  complete: { label: 'Complete', icon: CheckCircle2, color: 'text-green-500' },
};

export default function MyDashboardPage() {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [stats, setStats] = useState<DashboardStats | null>(null);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!user?.id) return;
    loadData();
  }, [user?.id]);

  const loadData = async () => {
    if (!user?.id) return;
    try {
      const [statsData, tasksData] = await Promise.all([
        TaskService.getDashboardStats(user.id),
        TaskService.getTasksForUser(user.id),
      ]);
      setStats(statsData);
      setTasks(tasksData);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error loading dashboard:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  const weekEnd = new Date();
  weekEnd.setDate(weekEnd.getDate() + 7);
  const weekEndStr = weekEnd.toISOString().split('T')[0];

  const overdueTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.due_date && t.due_date < today && t.status !== 'complete');
  const dueThisWeek = tasks.filter(t => t.due_date && t.due_date >= today && t.due_date <= weekEndStr && t.status !== 'complete');
  const inProgressTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'in_progress');
  const recentlyCompleted = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'complete').slice(0, 10);

  const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
    if (!dueDate) return 'text-gray-500';
    if (dueDate < today) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
    const diffDays = Math.ceil((new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00').getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
    return 'text-gray-500';
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 p-6">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64" />
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24 rounded-lg" />)}
          </div>
          <Skeleton className="h-64 rounded-lg" />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50">
      <div className="w-full">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Header */}
          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
                <LayoutDashboard className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">My Dashboard</h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Your assigned tasks and progress</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Stat Cards */}
          {stats && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 px-0">
              <StatCard icon={AlertTriangle} label="Overdue" value={stats.overdue} color="text-red-500" bg="bg-red-50" />
              <StatCard icon={Clock} label="Due This Week" value={stats.dueThisWeek} color="text-amber-500" bg="bg-amber-50" />
              <StatCard icon={PlayCircle} label="In Progress" value={stats.inProgress} color="text-blue-500" bg="bg-blue-50" />
              <StatCard icon={CheckCircle2} label="Completed (7d)" value={stats.completedThisWeek} color="text-green-500" bg="bg-green-50" />
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Overdue Tasks */}
          {overdueTasks.length > 0 && (
            <TaskSection title="Overdue" icon={AlertTriangle} color="text-red-600" tasks={overdueTasks} getDueDateColor={getDueDateColor} />
          )}

          {/* Due This Week */}
          {dueThisWeek.length > 0 && (
            <TaskSection title="Due This Week" icon={Clock} color="text-amber-600" tasks={dueThisWeek} getDueDateColor={getDueDateColor} />
          )}

          {/* In Progress */}
          {inProgressTasks.length > 0 && (
            <TaskSection title="In Progress" icon={PlayCircle} color="text-blue-600" tasks={inProgressTasks} getDueDateColor={getDueDateColor} />
          )}

          {/* Recently Completed */}
          {recentlyCompleted.length > 0 && (
            <TaskSection title="Recently Completed" icon={CheckCircle2} color="text-green-600" tasks={recentlyCompleted} getDueDateColor={getDueDateColor} />
          )}

          {tasks.length === 0 && (
            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-12 text-center">
              <LayoutDashboard className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
              <p className="text-gray-500">No tasks assigned to you yet.</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function StatCard({ icon: Icon, label, value, color, bg }: { icon: any; label: string; value: number; color: string; bg: string }) {
  return (
    <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        <div className={`${bg} p-2 rounded-lg`}>
          <Icon className={`h-5 w-5 ${color}`} />
        </div>
        <div>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{value}</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{label}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function TaskSection({ title, icon: Icon, color, tasks, getDueDateColor }: {
  title: string;
  icon: any;
  color: string;
  tasks: Task[];
  getDueDateColor: (d: string | null) => string;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
      <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
        <Icon className={`h-4 w-4 ${color}`} />
        <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">{title}</h3>
        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{tasks.length}</Badge>
      </div>
      <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
        {tasks.map((task) => {
          const cfg = STATUS_CONFIG[task.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.to_do;
          const StatusIcon = cfg.icon;
          return (
            <div key={task.id} className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-gray-50">
              <StatusIcon className={`h-4 w-4 ${cfg.color} flex-shrink-0`} />
              <span className={`flex-1 text-sm ${task.status === 'complete' ? 'line-through text-gray-400' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>
                {task.task_name}
              </span>
              {task.due_date && (
                <span className={`text-xs ${getDueDateColor(task.due_date)}`}>
                  {new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
                </span>
              )}
              {task.task_type && (
                <span className="text-[10px] bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{task.task_type}</span>
              )}
            </div>
          );
        })}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```text
File created successfully at: /Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/tasks/my-dashboard/page.tsx
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-17 13:42:20Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
import { TaskService, DashboardStats } from '@/lib/taskService';
import { ClientService } from '@/lib/clientService';
import {
  ShieldCheck,
  AlertTriangle,
  Clock,
  CheckCircle2,
  PlayCircle,
  Users,
  Building2,
} from 'lucide-react';

export default function AdminDashboardPage() {
  const { userProfile } = useAuth();
  const router = useRouter();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [overall, setOverall] = useState<DashboardStats | null>(null);
  const [byUser, setByUser] = useState<{ userId: string; userName: string; stats: DashboardStats }[]>([]);
  const [byClient, setByClient] = useState<{ clientId: string; clientName: string; count: number }[]>([]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (userProfile && userProfile.role !== 'admin' && userProfile.role !== 'super_admin') {
      router.push('/tasks');
      return;
    }
    loadData();
  }, [userProfile]);

  const loadData = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await TaskService.getAdminDashboardStats();
      setOverall(data.overall);
      setByUser(data.byUser);

      // Resolve client names
      const clients = await ClientService.getAllClients();
      const clientMap = new Map(clients.map(c => [c.id, c.name]));
      setByClient(data.byClient.map(bc => ({
        ...bc,
        clientName: clientMap.get(bc.clientId) || 'Unknown',
      })));
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error loading admin dashboard:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 p-6">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64" />
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24 rounded-lg" />)}
          </div>
          <Skeleton className="h-64 rounded-lg" />
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50">
      <div className="w-full">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Header */}
          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
                <ShieldCheck className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Admin Overview</h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Team task overview and workload distribution</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Overall Stats */}
          {overall && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
              <StatCard label="Total Tasks" value={overall.total} color="text-gray-600" bg="bg-gray-50" />
              <StatCard label="Overdue" value={overall.overdue} color="text-red-500" bg="bg-red-50" icon={AlertTriangle} />
              <StatCard label="Due This Week" value={overall.dueThisWeek} color="text-amber-500" bg="bg-amber-50" icon={Clock} />
              <StatCard label="In Progress" value={overall.inProgress} color="text-blue-500" bg="bg-blue-50" icon={PlayCircle} />
              <StatCard label="Completed (7d)" value={overall.completedThisWeek} color="text-green-500" bg="bg-green-50" icon={CheckCircle2} />
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Per Member */}
          <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
            <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
              <Users className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
              <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Tasks per Member</h3>
            </div>
            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
              <table className="w-full text-sm">
                <thead>
                  <tr className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50">
                    <th className="text-left py-2 px-4 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Member</th>
                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Total</th>
                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Overdue</th>
                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">In Progress</th>
                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Due Soon</th>
                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Done (7d)</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {byUser.sort((a, b) => b.stats.overdue - a.stats.overdue).map((u) => (
                    <tr key={u.userId} className="border-b border-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-50">
                      <td className="py-2.5 px-4 font-medium text-gray-900">{u.userName}</td>
                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center text-gray-600">{u.stats.total}</td>
                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center">
                        {u.stats.overdue > 0 ? (
                          <Badge variant="destructive" className="text-xs">{u.stats.overdue}</Badge>
                        ) : (
                          <span className="text-gray-400">0</span>
                        )}
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center text-blue-600">{u.stats.inProgress}</td>
                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center text-amber-600">{u.stats.dueThisWeek}</td>
                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center text-green-600">{u.stats.completedThisWeek}</td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Per Client */}
          {byClient.length > 0 && (
            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
              <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Tasks per Client</h3>
              </div>
              <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
                {byClient.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count).map((c) => (
                  <div
                    key={c.clientId}
                    className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
                    onClick={() => router.push(`/tasks/client/${c.clientId}`)}
                  >
                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{c.clientName}</span>
                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{c.count} tasks</Badge>
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function StatCard({ label, value, color, bg, icon: Icon }: { label: string; value: number; color: string; bg: string; icon?: any }) {
  return (
    <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        {Icon && (
          <div className={`${bg} p-2 rounded-lg`}>
            <Icon className={`h-5 w-5 ${color}`} />
          </div>
        )}
        <div>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{value}</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{label}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useParams } from 'next/navigation';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { TaskService, Task, DashboardStats } from '@/lib/taskService';
import { ClientService } from '@/lib/clientService';
import {
  Building2,
  AlertTriangle,
  Clock,
  CheckCircle2,
  PlayCircle,
  Circle,
  PauseCircle,
  MessageCircle,
  ArrowLeft,
} from 'lucide-react';
import Link from 'next/link';

const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; icon: typeof Circle; color: string }> = {
  to_do: { label: 'To Do', icon: Circle, color: 'text-gray-400' },
  in_progress: { label: 'In Progress', icon: PlayCircle, color: 'text-blue-500' },
  paused: { label: 'Paused', icon: PauseCircle, color: 'text-amber-500' },
  ready_for_feedback: { label: 'Feedback', icon: MessageCircle, color: 'text-purple-500' },
  complete: { label: 'Complete', icon: CheckCircle2, color: 'text-green-500' },
};

export default function ClientTasksPage() {
  const params = useParams();
  const clientId = params.clientId as string;
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [clientName, setClientName] = useState('');
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [stats, setStats] = useState<DashboardStats | null>(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    loadData();
  }, [clientId]);

  const loadData = async () => {
    try {
      const [clientData, dashData] = await Promise.all([
        ClientService.getClientByIdOrSlug(clientId),
        TaskService.getClientDashboardData(clientId),
      ]);
      setClientName(clientData?.name || 'Unknown Client');
      setTasks(dashData.tasks);
      setStats(dashData.stats);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error loading client tasks:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];

  const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
    if (!dueDate) return 'text-gray-500';
    if (dueDate < today) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
    const diffDays = Math.ceil((new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00').getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
    return 'text-gray-500';
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 p-6">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64" />
          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
            {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24 rounded-lg" />)}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  const activeTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.status !== 'complete');
  const completedTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'complete');

  return (
    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50">
      <div className="w-full">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Header */}
          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
              <Link href="/tasks/admin">
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
                  <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
                </Button>
              </Link>
              <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
                <Building2 className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
              </div>
              <div>
                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{clientName}</h2>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Client task overview and deliverables</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Stats */}
          {stats && (
            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
              <StatCard label="Total" value={stats.total} color="text-gray-600" bg="bg-gray-50" />
              <StatCard label="Overdue" value={stats.overdue} color="text-red-500" bg="bg-red-50" icon={AlertTriangle} />
              <StatCard label="In Progress" value={stats.inProgress} color="text-blue-500" bg="bg-blue-50" icon={PlayCircle} />
              <StatCard label="Completed" value={stats.byStatus['complete'] || 0} color="text-green-500" bg="bg-green-50" icon={CheckCircle2} />
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Active Tasks */}
          {activeTasks.length > 0 && (
            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
              <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
                <PlayCircle className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" />
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Active Tasks</h3>
                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{activeTasks.length}</Badge>
              </div>
              <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
                {activeTasks.map((task) => {
                  const cfg = STATUS_CONFIG[task.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.to_do;
                  const StatusIcon = cfg.icon;
                  return (
                    <div key={task.id} className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-gray-50">
                      <StatusIcon className={`h-4 w-4 ${cfg.color} flex-shrink-0`} />
                      <span className="flex-1 text-sm text-gray-900">{task.task_name}</span>
                      {task.assigned_to_name && (
                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{task.assigned_to_name}</span>
                      )}
                      {task.due_date && (
                        <span className={`text-xs ${getDueDateColor(task.due_date)}`}>
                          {new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
                        </span>
                      )}
                    </div>
                  );
                })}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Completed Tasks */}
          {completedTasks.length > 0 && (
            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
              <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
                <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
                <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Completed</h3>
                <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{completedTasks.length}</Badge>
              </div>
              <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
                {completedTasks.map((task) => (
                  <div key={task.id} className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-gray-50">
                    <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500 flex-shrink-0" />
                    <span className="flex-1 text-sm text-gray-400 line-through">{task.task_name}</span>
                    {task.completed_at && (
                      <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">
                        {new Date(task.completed_at).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
                      </span>
                    )}
                  </div>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          )}

          {tasks.length === 0 && (
            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-12 text-center">
              <Building2 className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
              <p className="text-gray-500">No tasks linked to this client yet.</p>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

function StatCard({ label, value, color, bg, icon: Icon }: { label: string; value: number; color: string; bg: string; icon?: any }) {
  return (
    <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-4">
      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
        {Icon && (
          <div className={`${bg} p-2 rounded-lg`}>
            <Icon className={`h-5 w-5 ${color}`} />
          </div>
        )}
        <div>
          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{value}</p>
          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{label}</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```
