```text
     7→import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
     8→import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
     9→import { Calendar } from '@/components/ui/calendar';
    10→import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
    11→import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    12→import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
    13→import dynamic from 'next/dynamic';
    14→import 'react-quill/dist/quill.snow.css';
    15→import { Task, TaskService } from '@/lib/taskService';
    16→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    17→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    18→import { TaskComments } from './TaskComments';
    19→import { TaskAttachments } from './TaskAttachments';
    20→import { TaskChecklist } from './TaskChecklist';
    21→import { SubtaskList } from './SubtaskList';
    22→import { RecurringConfigEditor } from './RecurringConfig';
    23→import {
    24→  Calendar as CalendarIcon,
    25→  Circle,
    26→  CheckCircle2,
    27→  PauseCircle,
    28→  PlayCircle,
    29→  MessageCircle,
    30→  AlertCircle,
    31→  ArrowUp,
    32→  ArrowDown,
    33→  Minus,
    34→  FileText,
    35→} from 'lucide-react';
    36→
    37→const ReactQuill = dynamic(() => import('react-quill'), { ssr: false });
    38→
    39→type TeamMember = {
    40→  id: string;
    41→  name: string;
    42→  email: string;
    43→  role: string;
    44→};
    45→
    46→type ClientOption = {
    47→  id: string;
    48→  name: string;
    49→};
    50→
    51→interface TaskDetailModalProps {
    52→  open: boolean;
    53→  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
    54→  task?: Task | null;
    55→  teamMembers: TeamMember[];
    56→  clients: ClientOption[];
    57→  onSaved: () => void;
    58→}
    59→
    60→const FREQUENCIES = ['one-time', 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'recurring'] as const;
    61→const FREQUENCY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
    62→  'one-time': 'One-Time', 'daily': 'Daily', 'weekly': 'Weekly', 'monthly': 'Monthly', 'recurring': 'Recurring',
    63→};
    64→const TASK_TYPES = [
    65→  'Admin & Operations', 'Finance & Invoicing', 'General', 'Tech & Tools',
    66→  'Marketing & Sales', 'Client SOP', 'Client Delivery', 'Performance Review', 'Research & Analytics',
    67→] as const;
    68→const STATUSES = ['to_do', 'in_progress', 'paused', 'ready_for_feedback', 'complete'] as const;
    69→const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; icon: typeof Circle; color: string }> = {
    70→  to_do: { label: 'To Do', icon: Circle, color: 'text-gray-400' },
    71→  in_progress: { label: 'In Progress', icon: PlayCircle, color: 'text-blue-500' },
    72→  paused: { label: 'Paused', icon: PauseCircle, color: 'text-amber-500' },
    73→  ready_for_feedback: { label: 'Ready for Feedback', icon: MessageCircle, color: 'text-purple-500' },
    74→  complete: { label: 'Complete', icon: CheckCircle2, color: 'text-green-500' },
    75→};
    76→const PRIORITIES = ['low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent'] as const;
    77→const PRIORITY_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; icon: typeof Minus; color: string }> = {
    78→  low: { label: 'Low', icon: ArrowDown, color: 'text-gray-400' },
    79→  medium: { label: 'Medium', icon: Minus, color: 'text-blue-500' },
    80→  high: { label: 'High', icon: ArrowUp, color: 'text-orange-500' },
    81→  urgent: { label: 'Urgent', icon: AlertCircle, color: 'text-red-500' },
    82→};
    83→
    84→const toLocalDateString = (date: Date) => {
    85→  const year = date.getFullYear();
    86→  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
    87→  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
    88→  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
    89→};
    90→
    91→export function TaskDetailModal({ open, onOpenChange, task, teamMembers, clients, onSaved }: TaskDetailModalProps) {
    92→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
    93→  const { toast } = useToast();
    94→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
    95→  const [savingTemplate, setSavingTemplate] = useState(false);
    96→  const [activeDetailTab, setActiveDetailTab] = useState('details');
    97→
    98→  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    99→    task_name: '',
   100→    assigned_to: '' as string,
   101→    due_date: undefined as Date | undefined,
   102→    frequency: '' as string,
   103→    task_type: '' as string,
   104→    link: '',
   105→    latest_comment: '',
   106→    description: '',
   107→    status: 'to_do' as string,
   108→    priority: 'medium' as string,
   109→    client_id: '' as string,
   110→    recurring_config: null as Record<string, any> | null,
   111→  });
   112→
   113→  useEffect(() => {
   114→    if (task) {
   115→      setForm({
   116→        task_name: task.task_name,
   117→        assigned_to: task.assigned_to || '',
   118→        due_date: task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined,
   119→        frequency: task.frequency,
   120→        task_type: task.task_type,
   121→        link: task.link || '',
   122→        latest_comment: task.latest_comment || '',
   123→        description: task.description || '',
   124→        status: task.status || 'to_do',
   125→        priority: task.priority || 'medium',
   126→        client_id: task.client_id || '',
   127→        recurring_config: task.recurring_config || null,
   128→      });
   129→    } else {
   130→      setForm({
   131→        task_name: '',
   132→        assigned_to: '',
   133→        due_date: undefined,
   134→        frequency: '',
   135→        task_type: '',
   136→        link: '',
   137→        latest_comment: '',
   138→        description: '',
   139→        status: 'to_do',
   140→        priority: 'medium',
   141→        client_id: '',
   142→        recurring_config: null,
   143→      });
   144→      setActiveDetailTab('details');
   145→    }
   146→  }, [task, open]);
   147→
   148→  const handleSubmit = async () => {
   149→    if (!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type) return;
   150→    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;
   151→
   152→    setSubmitting(true);
   153→    try {
   154→      const assignedMember = teamMembers.find(m => m.id === form.assigned_to);
   155→      const payload = {
   156→        task_name: form.task_name.trim(),
   157→        assigned_to: form.assigned_to || null,
   158→        assigned_to_name: assignedMember?.name || null,
   159→        due_date: form.due_date ? toLocalDateString(form.due_date) : null,
   160→        frequency: form.frequency,
   161→        task_type: form.task_type,
   162→        link: form.link.trim() || null,
   163→        latest_comment: form.latest_comment.trim() || null,
   164→        description: form.description.trim() || null,
   165→        status: form.status,
   166→        priority: form.priority,
   167→        client_id: form.client_id || null,
   168→        recurring_config: form.recurring_config || null,
   169→      };
   170→
   171→      if (task) {
   172→        await TaskService.updateTask(task.id, payload);
   173→        toast({ title: 'Updated', description: 'Task updated successfully.' });
   174→      } else {
   175→        await TaskService.createTask({
   176→          ...payload,
   177→          created_by: user.id,
   178→          created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
   179→        });
   180→        toast({ title: 'Created', description: 'Task created successfully.' });
   181→      }
   182→
   183→      onOpenChange(false);
   184→      onSaved();
   185→    } catch (err) {
   186→      console.error('Error saving task:', err);
   187→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save task.', variant: 'destructive' });
   188→    } finally {
   189→      setSubmitting(false);
   190→    }
   191→  };
   192→
   193→  const handleSaveAsTemplate = async () => {
   194→    if (!task) return;
   195→    setSavingTemplate(true);
   196→    try {
   197→      const template = await TaskService.saveTaskAsTemplate(
   198→        task.id,
   199→        form.task_name || task.task_name,
   200→        user?.id || null
   201→      );
   202→      if (template) {
   203→        toast({ title: 'Template Saved', description: `"${template.name}" template created.` });
   204→      }
   205→    } catch (err) {
   206→      console.error('Error saving as template:', err);
   207→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save as template.', variant: 'destructive' });
   208→    } finally {
   209→      setSavingTemplate(false);
   210→    }
   211→  };
   212→
   213→  const isEditing = !!task;
   214→
   215→  return (
   216→    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
   217→      <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[750px] max-h-[90vh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col">
   218→        <DialogHeader>
   219→          <DialogTitle>{isEditing ? 'Edit Task' : 'Add Task'}</DialogTitle>
   220→          <DialogDescription>
   221→            {isEditing ? 'Update task details, add comments, or attach files.' : 'Create a new task for the team.'}
   222→          </DialogDescription>
   223→        </DialogHeader>
   224→
   225→        {isEditing ? (
   226→          <Tabs value={activeDetailTab} onValueChange={setActiveDetailTab} className="flex-1 min-h-0 flex flex-col">
   227→            <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 w-full justify-start flex-wrap">
   228→              <TabsTrigger value="details" className="text-xs">Details</TabsTrigger>
   229→              <TabsTrigger value="checklist" className="text-xs">Checklist</TabsTrigger>
   230→              <TabsTrigger value="subtasks" className="text-xs">Subtasks</TabsTrigger>
   231→              <TabsTrigger value="comments" className="text-xs">Comments</TabsTrigger>
   232→              <TabsTrigger value="attachments" className="text-xs">Attachments</TabsTrigger>
   233→            </TabsList>
   234→
   235→            <TabsContent value="details" className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto mt-0 px-1 pb-4">
   236→              {renderFormFields()}
   237→            </TabsContent>
   238→
   239→            <TabsContent value="checklist" className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto mt-0 px-1 pb-4">
   240→              {task && <TaskChecklist taskId={task.id} />}
   241→            </TabsContent>
   242→
   243→            <TabsContent value="subtasks" className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto mt-0 px-1 pb-4">
   244→              {task && <SubtaskList parentTaskId={task.id} />}
   245→            </TabsContent>
   246→
   247→            <TabsContent value="comments" className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto mt-0 px-1 pb-4">
   248→              {task && <TaskComments taskId={task.id} />}
   249→            </TabsContent>
   250→
   251→            <TabsContent value="attachments" className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto mt-0 px-1 pb-4">
   252→              {task && <TaskAttachments taskId={task.id} />}
   253→            </TabsContent>
   254→          </Tabs>
   255→        ) : (
   256→          <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-4">
   257→            {renderFormFields()}
   258→          </div>
   259→        )}
   260→
   261→        <DialogFooter className="flex-wrap gap-2">
   262→          {isEditing && (
   263→            <Button
   264→              variant="outline"
   265→              size="sm"
   266→              className="text-xs mr-auto"
   267→              onClick={handleSaveAsTemplate}
   268→              disabled={savingTemplate}
   269→            >
   270→              <FileText className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" />
   271→              {savingTemplate ? 'Saving...' : 'Save as Template'}
   272→            </Button>
   273→          )}
   274→          <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>Cancel</Button>
   275→          <Button
   276→            className="hover:opacity-90"
   277→            style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   278→            onClick={handleSubmit}
   279→            disabled={!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type || submitting}
   280→          >
   281→            {submitting ? (
   282→              <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" />
   283→            ) : isEditing ? 'Save Changes' : 'Add Task'}
   284→          </Button>
   285→        </DialogFooter>
   286→      </DialogContent>
   287→    </Dialog>
   288→  );
   289→
   290→  function renderFormFields() {
   291→    return (
   292→      <div className="space-y-4">
   293→        {/* Task Name */}
   294→        <div className="grid gap-2">
   295→          <Label>Task Name <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   296→          <Input
   297→            value={form.task_name}
   298→            onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, task_name: e.target.value })}
   299→            placeholder="Enter task name"
   300→            className="auth-input"
   301→          />
   302→        </div>
   303→
   304→        {/* Description */}
   305→        <div className="grid gap-2">
   306→          <Label>Description</Label>
   307→          <div className="task-editor-wrapper">
   308→            <style jsx global>{`
   309→              .task-editor-wrapper {
   310→                height: 200px;
   311→                min-height: 150px;
   312→                max-height: 50vh;
   313→                overflow-y: auto;
   314→                border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
   315→                border-radius: 0.375rem;
   316→                resize: vertical;
   317→              }
   318→              .task-editor-wrapper .ql-toolbar {
   319→                position: sticky;
   320→                top: 0;
   321→                z-index: 10;
   322→                background: white;
   323→                border-top: none;
   324→                border-left: none;
   325→                border-right: none;
   326→              }
   327→              .task-editor-wrapper .ql-container {
   328→                border: none;
   329→                min-height: 120px;
   330→              }
   331→            `}</style>
   332→            <ReactQuill
   333→              theme="snow"
   334→              value={form.description}
   335→              onChange={(value) => setForm({ ...form, description: value })}
   336→              modules={{
   337→                toolbar: [
   338→                  [{ 'header': [1, 2, 3, false] }],
   339→                  ['bold', 'italic', 'underline'],
   340→                  [{ 'list': 'ordered'}, { 'list': 'bullet' }],
   341→                  [{ 'indent': '-1'}, { 'indent': '+1' }],
   342→                  ['link'],
   343→                  ['clean']
   344→                ],
   345→              }}
   346→              placeholder="Add a description..."
   347→              className="bg-white"
   348→            />
   349→          </div>
   350→        </div>
   351→
   352→        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   353→          {/* Assigned To */}
   354→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   355→            <Label>Assigned To</Label>
   356→            <Select value={form.assigned_to} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, assigned_to: v })}>
   357→              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select team member" /></SelectTrigger>
   358→              <SelectContent>
   359→                {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
   360→              </SelectContent>
   361→            </Select>
   362→          </div>
   363→
   364→          {/* Due Date */}
   365→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   366→            <Label>Due Date</Label>
   367→            <Popover>
   368→              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   369→                <Button
   370→                  variant="outline"
   371→                  className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal"
   372→                  style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: form.due_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
   373→                >
   374→                  <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   375→                  {form.due_date ? form.due_date.toLocaleDateString() : 'Select date'}
   376→                </Button>
   377→              </PopoverTrigger>
   378→              <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   379→                <Calendar
   380→                  mode="single"
   381→                  selected={form.due_date}
   382→                  onSelect={(date) => setForm({ ...form, due_date: date || undefined })}
   383→                  initialFocus
   384→                  classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
   385→                  modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
   386→                />
   387→              </PopoverContent>
   388→            </Popover>
   389→          </div>
   390→        </div>
   391→
   392→        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   393→          {/* Frequency */}
   394→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   395→            <Label>Frequency <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   396→            <Select value={form.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, frequency: v })}>
   397→              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select frequency" /></SelectTrigger>
   398→              <SelectContent>
   399→                {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{FREQUENCY_LABELS[f]}</SelectItem>)}
   400→              </SelectContent>
   401→            </Select>
   402→          </div>
   403→
   404→          {/* Task Type */}
   405→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   406→            <Label>Task Type <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   407→            <Select value={form.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, task_type: v })}>
   408→              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select type" /></SelectTrigger>
   409→              <SelectContent>
   410→                {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   411→              </SelectContent>
   412→            </Select>
   413→          </div>
   414→        </div>
   415→
   416→        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   417→          {/* Status */}
   418→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   419→            <Label>Status</Label>
   420→            <Select value={form.status} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, status: v })}>
   421→              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select status" /></SelectTrigger>
   422→              <SelectContent>
   423→                {STATUSES.map((s) => {
   424→                  const cfg = STATUS_CONFIG[s];
   425→                  const Icon = cfg.icon;
   426→                  return (
   427→                    <SelectItem key={s} value={s}>
   428→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   429→                        <Icon className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${cfg.color}`} />
   430→                        {cfg.label}
   431→                      </div>
   432→                    </SelectItem>
   433→                  );
   434→                })}
   435→              </SelectContent>
   436→            </Select>
   437→          </div>
   438→
   439→          {/* Priority */}
   440→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   441→            <Label>Priority</Label>
   442→            <Select value={form.priority} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, priority: v })}>
   443→              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select priority" /></SelectTrigger>
   444→              <SelectContent>
   445→                {PRIORITIES.map((p) => {
   446→                  const cfg = PRIORITY_CONFIG[p];
   447→                  const Icon = cfg.icon;
   448→                  return (
   449→                    <SelectItem key={p} value={p}>
   450→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   451→                        <Icon className={`h-3.5 w-3.5 ${cfg.color}`} />
   452→                        {cfg.label}
   453→                      </div>
   454→                    </SelectItem>
   455→                  );
   456→                })}
   457→              </SelectContent>
   458→            </Select>
   459→          </div>
   460→        </div>
   461→
   462→        <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   463→          {/* Client */}
   464→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   465→            <Label>Client</Label>
   466→            <Select value={form.client_id} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, client_id: v === '_none' ? '' : v })}>
   467→              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select client" /></SelectTrigger>
   468→              <SelectContent>
   469→                <SelectItem value="_none">No client</SelectItem>
   470→                {clients.map((c) => <SelectItem key={c.id} value={c.id}>{c.name}</SelectItem>)}
   471→              </SelectContent>
   472→            </Select>
   473→          </div>
   474→
   475→          {/* Link */}
   476→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   477→            <Label>Link</Label>
   478→            <Input
   479→              value={form.link}
   480→              onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, link: e.target.value })}
   481→              placeholder="https://..."
   482→              className="auth-input"
   483→            />
   484→          </div>
   485→        </div>
   486→
   487→        {/* Recurring Config */}
   488→        <RecurringConfigEditor
   489→          value={form.recurring_config as any}
   490→          onChange={(config) => setForm({ ...form, recurring_config: config })}
   491→        />
   492→
   493→        {/* Latest Comment (kept for backward compat, only for non-edit mode) */}
   494→        {!isEditing && (
   495→          <div className="grid gap-2">
   496→            <Label>Comment</Label>
   497→            <Textarea
   498→              value={form.latest_comment}
   499→              onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, latest_comment: e.target.value })}
   500→              placeholder="Add an initial comment..."
   501→              className="auth-input"
   502→              rows={2}
   503→            />
   504→          </div>
   505→        )}
   506→      </div>
   507→    );
   508→  }
   509→}
   510→
```
</details></tool-use>

'#111827' : '#9ca3af' }`, calendar uses `classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}` and `modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}`

 `./components/tasks/RecurringConfig.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
     4→import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
     5→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     6→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     7→import { RecurringConfig as RecurringConfigType } from '@/lib/taskService';
     8→import { RefreshCw, X } from 'lucide-react';
     9→
    10→interface RecurringConfigProps {
    11→  value: RecurringConfigType | null;
    12→  onChange: (config: RecurringConfigType | null) => void;
    13→}
    14→
    15→const DAYS_OF_WEEK = [
    16→  { value: '0', label: 'Sunday' },
    17→  { value: '1', label: 'Monday' },
    18→  { value: '2', label: 'Tuesday' },
    19→  { value: '3', label: 'Wednesday' },
    20→  { value: '4', label: 'Thursday' },
    21→  { value: '5', label: 'Friday' },
    22→  { value: '6', label: 'Saturday' },
    23→];
    24→
    25→export function RecurringConfigEditor({ value, onChange }: RecurringConfigProps) {
    26→  const isEnabled = !!value;
    27→
    28→  const enable = () => {
    29→    onChange({ frequency: 'weekly' });
    30→  };
    31→
    32→  const disable = () => {
    33→    onChange(null);
    34→  };
    35→
    36→  const update = (partial: Partial<RecurringConfigType>) => {
    37→    onChange({ ...value!, ...partial });
    38→  };
    39→
    40→  if (!isEnabled) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div className="space-y-2">
    43→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    44→          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
    45→          <Label className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Recurring</Label>
    46→        </div>
    47→        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs" onClick={enable}>
    48→          <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Enable recurring
    49→        </Button>
    50→      </div>
    51→    );
    52→  }
    53→
    54→  return (
    55→    <div className="space-y-3 p-3 bg-blue-50/50 border border-blue-100 rounded-lg">
    56→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
    57→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    58→          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" />
    59→          <Label className="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-700">Recurring Task</Label>
    60→        </div>
    61→        <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 w-6 p-0 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500" onClick={disable}>
    62→          <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
    63→        </Button>
    64→      </div>
    65→
    66→      <p className="text-xs text-blue-600">When this task is completed, a new instance will be auto-created with the next due date.</p>
    67→
    68→      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
    69→        {/* Frequency */}
    70→        <div className="grid gap-1">
    71→          <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">Frequency</Label>
    72→          <Select value={value.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => update({ frequency: v as any })}>
    73→            <SelectTrigger className="h-8 text-xs">
    74→              <SelectValue />
    75→            </SelectTrigger>
    76→            <SelectContent>
    77→              <SelectItem value="daily">Daily</SelectItem>
    78→              <SelectItem value="weekly">Weekly</SelectItem>
    79→              <SelectItem value="monthly">Monthly</SelectItem>
    80→            </SelectContent>
    81→          </Select>
    82→        </div>
    83→
    84→        {/* Day of week (for weekly) */}
    85→        {value.frequency === 'weekly' && (
    86→          <div className="grid gap-1">
    87→            <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">Day of Week</Label>
    88→            <Select
    89→              value={value.day_of_week?.toString() ?? ''}
    90→              onValueChange={(v) => update({ day_of_week: parseInt(v) })}
    91→            >
    92→              <SelectTrigger className="h-8 text-xs">
    93→                <SelectValue placeholder="Any" />
    94→              </SelectTrigger>
    95→              <SelectContent>
    96→                {DAYS_OF_WEEK.map(d => (
    97→                  <SelectItem key={d.value} value={d.value}>{d.label}</SelectItem>
    98→                ))}
    99→              </SelectContent>
   100→            </Select>
   101→          </div>
   102→        )}
   103→
   104→        {/* Day of month (for monthly) */}
   105→        {value.frequency === 'monthly' && (
   106→          <div className="grid gap-1">
   107→            <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">Day of Month</Label>
   108→            <Input
   109→              type="number"
   110→              min={1}
   111→              max={31}
   112→              value={value.day_of_month || ''}
   113→              onChange={(e) => update({ day_of_month: parseInt(e.target.value) || undefined })}
   114→              className="h-8 text-xs"
   115→              placeholder="1-31"
   116→            />
   117→          </div>
   118→        )}
   119→      </div>
   120→
   121→      {/* End date */}
   122→      <div className="grid gap-1">
   123→        <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">End Date (optional)</Label>
   124→        <Input
   125→          type="date"
   126→          value={value.end_date || ''}
   127→          onChange={(e) => update({ end_date: e.target.value || undefined })}
   128→          className="h-8 text-xs"
   129→        />
   130→      </div>
   131→    </div>
   132→  );
   133→}
   134→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./components/tasks/TaskChecklist.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     4→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     5→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     6→import { TaskService, TaskChecklistItem } from '@/lib/taskService';
     7→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
     8→import { Plus, Trash2, CheckSquare, Square, ListChecks } from 'lucide-react';
     9→
    10→interface TaskChecklistProps {
    11→  taskId: string;
    12→}
    13→
    14→export function TaskChecklist({ taskId }: TaskChecklistProps) {
    15→  const { toast } = useToast();
    16→  const [items, setItems] = useState<TaskChecklistItem[]>([]);
    17→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    18→  const [newItemText, setNewItemText] = useState('');
    19→  const [editingItemId, setEditingItemId] = useState<string | null>(null);
    20→  const [editText, setEditText] = useState('');
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    loadItems();
    24→  }, [taskId]);
    25→
    26→  const loadItems = async () => {
    27→    try {
    28→      const data = await TaskService.getChecklist(taskId);
    29→      setItems(data);
    30→    } catch {
    31→      // silent
    32→    } finally {
    33→      setLoading(false);
    34→    }
    35→  };
    36→
    37→  const handleAdd = async () => {
    38→    if (!newItemText.trim()) return;
    39→    try {
    40→      await TaskService.addChecklistItem(taskId, newItemText.trim(), items.length);
    41→      setNewItemText('');
    42→      await loadItems();
    43→    } catch {
    44→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to add item.', variant: 'destructive' });
    45→    }
    46→  };
    47→
    48→  const handleToggle = async (item: TaskChecklistItem) => {
    49→    // Optimistic update
    50→    setItems(prev => prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, is_done: !i.is_done } : i));
    51→    try {
    52→      await TaskService.toggleChecklistItem(item.id, !item.is_done);
    53→    } catch {
    54→      setItems(prev => prev.map(i => i.id === item.id ? { ...i, is_done: item.is_done } : i));
    55→    }
    56→  };
    57→
    58→  const handleEdit = async (itemId: string) => {
    59→    if (!editText.trim()) {
    60→      setEditingItemId(null);
    61→      return;
    62→    }
    63→    try {
    64→      await TaskService.updateChecklistItem(itemId, editText.trim());
    65→      setEditingItemId(null);
    66→      setEditText('');
    67→      await loadItems();
    68→    } catch {
    69→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to update item.', variant: 'destructive' });
    70→    }
    71→  };
    72→
    73→  const handleDelete = async (itemId: string) => {
    74→    setItems(prev => prev.filter(i => i.id !== itemId));
    75→    try {
    76→      await TaskService.deleteChecklistItem(itemId);
    77→    } catch {
    78→      await loadItems();
    79→    }
    80→  };
    81→
    82→  const doneCount = items.filter(i => i.is_done).length;
    83→  const progress = items.length > 0 ? Math.round((doneCount / items.length) * 100) : 0;
    84→
    85→  if (loading) {
    86→    return <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 py-2 text-center">Loading checklist...</div>;
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  return (
    90→    <div className="space-y-3">
    91→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
    92→        <ListChecks className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
    93→        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Checklist</h4>
    94→        {items.length > 0 && (
    95→          <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{doneCount}/{items.length}</span>
    96→        )}
    97→      </div>
    98→
    99→      {/* Progress bar */}
   100→      {items.length > 0 && (
   101→        <div className="h-1.5 bg-gray-100 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   102→          <div
   103→            className="h-full rounded-full transition-all duration-300"
   104→            style={{ width: `${progress}%`, backgroundColor: progress === 100 ? '#22c55e' : '#3e8692' }}
   105→          />
   106→        </div>
   107→      )}
   108→
   109→      {/* Items */}
   110→      <div className="space-y-1">
   111→        {items.map((item) => (
   112→          <div key={item.id} className="flex items-center gap-2 group py-0.5">
   113→            <button
   114→              onClick={() => handleToggle(item)}
   115→              className="flex-shrink-0 hover:opacity-80"
   116→            >
   117→              {item.is_done ? (
   118→                <CheckSquare className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500" />
   119→              ) : (
   120→                <Square className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 hover:text-gray-500" />
   121→              )}
   122→            </button>
   123→            {editingItemId === item.id ? (
   124→              <Input
   125→                value={editText}
   126→                onChange={(e) => setEditText(e.target.value)}
   127→                onBlur={() => handleEdit(item.id)}
   128→                onKeyDown={(e) => {
   129→                  if (e.key === 'Enter') handleEdit(item.id);
   130→                  if (e.key === 'Escape') { setEditingItemId(null); setEditText(''); }
   131→                }}
   132→                className="flex-1 h-6 text-xs border-none shadow-none p-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0"
   133→                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   134→                autoFocus
   135→              />
   136→            ) : (
   137→              <span
   138→                className={`flex-1 text-xs cursor-pointer ${item.is_done ? 'line-through text-gray-400' : 'text-gray-700'}`}
   139→                onDoubleClick={() => { setEditingItemId(item.id); setEditText(item.text); }}
   140→              >
   141→                {item.text}
   142→              </span>
   143→            )}
   144→            <Button
   145→              variant="ghost"
   146→              size="sm"
   147→              className="h-5 w-5 p-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity hover:bg-red-50"
   148→              onClick={() => handleDelete(item.id)}
   149→            >
   150→              <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3 text-red-400" />
   151→            </Button>
   152→          </div>
   153→        ))}
   154→      </div>
   155→
   156→      {/* Add new item */}
   157→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   158→        <Plus className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-400 flex-shrink-0" />
   159→        <Input
   160→          value={newItemText}
   161→          onChange={(e) => setNewItemText(e.target.value)}
   162→          onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') handleAdd(); }}
   163→          placeholder="Add checklist item..."
   164→          className="flex-1 h-7 text-xs border-none shadow-none px-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0"
   165→          style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   166→        />
   167→      </div>
   168→    </div>
   169→  );
   170→}
   171→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./components/tasks/SubtaskList.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     4→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     5→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     6→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
     7→import { TaskService, Task } from '@/lib/taskService';
     8→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     9→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    10→import {
    11→  Plus,
    12→  Trash2,
    13→  Circle,
    14→  CheckCircle2,
    15→  PauseCircle,
    16→  PlayCircle,
    17→  MessageCircle,
    18→  GitBranch,
    19→} from 'lucide-react';
    20→
    21→interface SubtaskListProps {
    22→  parentTaskId: string;
    23→  onSubtaskClick?: (task: Task) => void;
    24→}
    25→
    26→const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; icon: typeof Circle; color: string }> = {
    27→  to_do: { label: 'To Do', icon: Circle, color: 'text-gray-400' },
    28→  in_progress: { label: 'In Progress', icon: PlayCircle, color: 'text-blue-500' },
    29→  paused: { label: 'Paused', icon: PauseCircle, color: 'text-amber-500' },
    30→  ready_for_feedback: { label: 'Feedback', icon: MessageCircle, color: 'text-purple-500' },
    31→  complete: { label: 'Complete', icon: CheckCircle2, color: 'text-green-500' },
    32→};
    33→
    34→export function SubtaskList({ parentTaskId, onSubtaskClick }: SubtaskListProps) {
    35→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
    36→  const { toast } = useToast();
    37→  const [subtasks, setSubtasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
    38→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    39→  const [adding, setAdding] = useState(false);
    40→  const [newName, setNewName] = useState('');
    41→
    42→  useEffect(() => {
    43→    loadSubtasks();
    44→  }, [parentTaskId]);
    45→
    46→  const loadSubtasks = async () => {
    47→    try {
    48→      const data = await TaskService.getSubtasks(parentTaskId);
    49→      setSubtasks(data);
    50→    } catch {
    51→      // silent
    52→    } finally {
    53→      setLoading(false);
    54→    }
    55→  };
    56→
    57→  const handleAdd = async () => {
    58→    if (!newName.trim() || !user?.id || !userProfile) return;
    59→    try {
    60→      await TaskService.createTask({
    61→        task_name: newName.trim(),
    62→        parent_task_id: parentTaskId,
    63→        status: 'to_do',
    64→        frequency: 'one-time',
    65→        task_type: 'General',
    66→        created_by: user.id,
    67→        created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
    68→      });
    69→      setNewName('');
    70→      setAdding(false);
    71→      await loadSubtasks();
    72→    } catch {
    73→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to add subtask.', variant: 'destructive' });
    74→    }
    75→  };
    76→
    77→  const handleStatusToggle = async (subtask: Task) => {
    78→    const newStatus = subtask.status === 'complete' ? 'to_do' : 'complete';
    79→    setSubtasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === subtask.id ? { ...t, status: newStatus } : t));
    80→    try {
    81→      await TaskService.updateField(subtask.id, 'status', newStatus);
    82→    } catch {
    83→      await loadSubtasks();
    84→    }
    85→  };
    86→
    87→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    88→    setSubtasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
    89→    try {
    90→      await TaskService.deleteTask(id);
    91→    } catch {
    92→      await loadSubtasks();
    93→    }
    94→  };
    95→
    96→  const doneCount = subtasks.filter(t => t.status === 'complete').length;
    97→
    98→  if (loading) {
    99→    return <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 py-2 text-center">Loading subtasks...</div>;
   100→  }
   101→
   102→  return (
   103→    <div className="space-y-2">
   104→      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   105→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   106→          <GitBranch className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
   107→          <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Subtasks</h4>
   108→          {subtasks.length > 0 && (
   109→            <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{doneCount}/{subtasks.length}</span>
   110→          )}
   111→        </div>
   112→        <Button
   113→          variant="ghost"
   114→          size="sm"
   115→          className="h-6 px-2 text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700"
   116→          onClick={() => setAdding(true)}
   117→        >
   118→          <Plus className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Add
   119→        </Button>
   120→      </div>
   121→
   122→      {subtasks.length > 0 && (
   123→        <div className="space-y-0.5">
   124→          {subtasks.map((subtask) => {
   125→            const cfg = STATUS_CONFIG[subtask.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.to_do;
   126→            const Icon = cfg.icon;
   127→            return (
   128→              <div key={subtask.id} className="flex items-center gap-2 py-1 px-1 rounded hover:bg-gray-50 group">
   129→                <button onClick={() => handleStatusToggle(subtask)} className="flex-shrink-0">
   130→                  <Icon className={`h-4 w-4 ${cfg.color}`} />
   131→                </button>
   132→                <span
   133→                  className={`flex-1 text-xs cursor-pointer ${subtask.status === 'complete' ? 'line-through text-gray-400' : 'text-gray-700'}`}
   134→                  onClick={() => onSubtaskClick?.(subtask)}
   135→                >
   136→                  {subtask.task_name}
   137→                </span>
   138→                {subtask.due_date && (
   139→                  <span className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">
   140→                    {new Date(subtask.due_date + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
   141→                  </span>
   142→                )}
   143→                <Button
   144→                  variant="ghost"
   145→                  size="sm"
   146→                  className="h-5 w-5 p-0 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 hover:bg-red-50"
   147→                  onClick={() => handleDelete(subtask.id)}
   148→                >
   149→                  <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3 text-red-400" />
   150→                </Button>
   151→              </div>
   152→            );
   153→          })}
   154→        </div>
   155→      )}
   156→
   157→      {adding && (
   158→        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   159→          <Circle className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 flex-shrink-0" />
   160→          <Input
   161→            value={newName}
   162→            onChange={(e) => setNewName(e.target.value)}
   163→            onBlur={() => { if (!newName.trim()) setAdding(false); else handleAdd(); }}
   164→            onKeyDown={(e) => {
   165→              if (e.key === 'Enter') handleAdd();
   166→              if (e.key === 'Escape') { setAdding(false); setNewName(''); }
   167→            }}
   168→            placeholder="Subtask name..."
   169→            className="flex-1 h-7 text-xs border-none shadow-none px-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0"
   170→            style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   171→            autoFocus
   172→          />
   173→        </div>
   174→      )}
   175→
   176→      {subtasks.length === 0 && !adding && (
   177→        <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 text-center py-1">No subtasks</p>
   178→      )}
   179→    </div>
   180→  );
   181→}
   182→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./components/tasks/TaskComments.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     4→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     5→import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
     6→import { TaskService, TaskComment } from '@/lib/taskService';
     7→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     8→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
     9→import { Send, Reply, Trash2, Edit, CornerDownRight, MessageSquare } from 'lucide-react';
    10→
    11→interface TaskCommentsProps {
    12→  taskId: string;
    13→  onCommentCountChange?: (count: number) => void;
    14→}
    15→
    16→export function TaskComments({ taskId, onCommentCountChange }: TaskCommentsProps) {
    17→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
    18→  const { toast } = useToast();
    19→  const [comments, setComments] = useState<TaskComment[]>([]);
    20→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    21→  const [newComment, setNewComment] = useState('');
    22→  const [replyingTo, setReplyingTo] = useState<string | null>(null);
    23→  const [replyContent, setReplyContent] = useState('');
    24→  const [editingCommentId, setEditingCommentId] = useState<string | null>(null);
    25→  const [editContent, setEditContent] = useState('');
    26→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
    27→
    28→  useEffect(() => {
    29→    loadComments();
    30→  }, [taskId]);
    31→
    32→  const loadComments = async () => {
    33→    try {
    34→      const data = await TaskService.getComments(taskId);
    35→      setComments(data);
    36→      const totalCount = data.reduce((sum, c) => sum + 1 + (c.replies?.length || 0), 0);
    37→      onCommentCountChange?.(totalCount);
    38→    } catch {
    39→      // silent
    40→    } finally {
    41→      setLoading(false);
    42→    }
    43→  };
    44→
    45→  const handleAddComment = async (parentId?: string) => {
    46→    const content = parentId ? replyContent.trim() : newComment.trim();
    47→    if (!content || !user?.id || !userProfile) return;
    48→
    49→    setSubmitting(true);
    50→    try {
    51→      await TaskService.addComment(
    52→        taskId,
    53→        user.id,
    54→        userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
    55→        content,
    56→        parentId
    57→      );
    58→      if (parentId) {
    59→        setReplyContent('');
    60→        setReplyingTo(null);
    61→      } else {
    62→        setNewComment('');
    63→      }
    64→      await loadComments();
    65→    } catch {
    66→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to add comment.', variant: 'destructive' });
    67→    } finally {
    68→      setSubmitting(false);
    69→    }
    70→  };
    71→
    72→  const handleEditComment = async (commentId: string) => {
    73→    if (!editContent.trim()) return;
    74→    setSubmitting(true);
    75→    try {
    76→      await TaskService.updateComment(commentId, editContent.trim());
    77→      setEditingCommentId(null);
    78→      setEditContent('');
    79→      await loadComments();
    80→    } catch {
    81→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to update comment.', variant: 'destructive' });
    82→    } finally {
    83→      setSubmitting(false);
    84→    }
    85→  };
    86→
    87→  const handleDeleteComment = async (commentId: string) => {
    88→    try {
    89→      await TaskService.deleteComment(commentId);
    90→      await loadComments();
    91→    } catch {
    92→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to delete comment.', variant: 'destructive' });
    93→    }
    94→  };
    95→
    96→  const timeAgo = (dateStr: string) => {
    97→    const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();
    98→    const mins = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
    99→    if (mins < 1) return 'just now';
   100→    if (mins < 60) return `${mins}m ago`;
   101→    const hrs = Math.floor(mins / 60);
   102→    if (hrs < 24) return `${hrs}h ago`;
   103→    const days = Math.floor(hrs / 24);
   104→    if (days < 7) return `${days}d ago`;
   105→    return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
   106→  };
   107→
   108→  const renderComment = (comment: TaskComment, isReply = false) => {
   109→    const isEditing = editingCommentId === comment.id;
   110→    const isOwner = user?.id === comment.user_id;
   111→    const isAdmin = userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin';
   112→    const initials = (comment.user_name || '?').split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
   113→
   114→    return (
   115→      <div key={comment.id} className={`${isReply ? 'ml-8' : ''}`}>
   116→        <div className="flex gap-2.5 group">
   117→          <div className="h-7 w-7 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] flex items-center justify-center text-white text-[10px] font-bold flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5">
   118→            {initials}
   119→          </div>
   120→          <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   121→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   122→              <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{comment.user_name || 'Unknown'}</span>
   123→              <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{timeAgo(comment.created_at)}</span>
   124→              {comment.updated_at !== comment.created_at && (
   125→                <span className="text-xs text-gray-400 italic">(edited)</span>
   126→              )}
   127→            </div>
   128→            {isEditing ? (
   129→              <div className="mt-1 space-y-2">
   130→                <Textarea
   131→                  value={editContent}
   132→                  onChange={(e) => setEditContent(e.target.value)}
   133→                  className="text-sm min-h-[60px]"
   134→                  autoFocus
   135→                />
   136→                <div className="flex gap-2">
   137→                  <Button size="sm" onClick={() => handleEditComment(comment.id)} disabled={submitting} className="h-7 text-xs" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}>
   138→                    Save
   139→                  </Button>
   140→                  <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => { setEditingCommentId(null); setEditContent(''); }} className="h-7 text-xs">
   141→                    Cancel
   142→                  </Button>
   143→                </div>
   144→              </div>
   145→            ) : (
   146→              <p className="text-sm text-gray-700 mt-0.5 whitespace-pre-wrap">{comment.content}</p>
   147→            )}
   148→            {!isEditing && (
   149→              <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   150→                {!isReply && (
   151→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 px-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500" onClick={() => { setReplyingTo(comment.id); setReplyContent(''); }}>
   152→                    <Reply className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Reply
   153→                  </Button>
   154→                )}
   155→                {isOwner && (
   156→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 px-1.5 text-xs text-gray-500" onClick={() => { setEditingCommentId(comment.id); setEditContent(comment.content); }}>
   157→                    <Edit className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Edit
   158→                  </Button>
   159→                )}
   160→                {(isOwner || isAdmin) && (
   161→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 px-1.5 text-xs text-red-500 hover:text-red-700" onClick={() => handleDeleteComment(comment.id)}>
   162→                    <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3" />
   163→                  </Button>
   164→                )}
   165→              </div>
   166→            )}
   167→          </div>
   168→        </div>
   169→
   170→        {/* Reply input */}
   171→        {replyingTo === comment.id && (
   172→          <div className="ml-8 mt-2 flex gap-2">
   173→            <CornerDownRight className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-300 mt-2 flex-shrink-0" />
   174→            <div className="flex-1">
   175→              <Textarea
   176→                value={replyContent}
   177→                onChange={(e) => setReplyContent(e.target.value)}
   178→                placeholder="Write a reply..."
   179→                className="text-sm min-h-[50px]"
   180→                autoFocus
   181→              />
   182→              <div className="flex gap-2 mt-1.5">
   183→                <Button size="sm" onClick={() => handleAddComment(comment.id)} disabled={!replyContent.trim() || submitting} className="h-7 text-xs" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}>
   184→                  <Send className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Reply
   185→                </Button>
   186→                <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" onClick={() => { setReplyingTo(null); setReplyContent(''); }} className="h-7 text-xs">
   187→                  Cancel
   188→                </Button>
   189→              </div>
   190→            </div>
   191→          </div>
   192→        )}
   193→
   194→        {/* Replies */}
   195→        {comment.replies && comment.replies.length > 0 && (
   196→          <div className="mt-2 space-y-2">
   197→            {comment.replies.map(reply => renderComment(reply, true))}
   198→          </div>
   199→        )}
   200→      </div>
   201→    );
   202→  };
   203→
   204→  if (loading) {
   205→    return <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 py-4 text-center">Loading comments...</div>;
   206→  }
   207→
   208→  return (
   209→    <div className="space-y-4">
   210→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   211→        <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
   212→        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Comments</h4>
   213→        {comments.length > 0 && (
   214→          <span className="text-xs bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">
   215→            {comments.reduce((sum, c) => sum + 1 + (c.replies?.length || 0), 0)}
   216→          </span>
   217→        )}
   218→      </div>
   219→
   220→      {/* Comment list */}
   221→      {comments.length > 0 ? (
   222→        <div className="space-y-3">
   223→          {comments.map(c => renderComment(c))}
   224→        </div>
   225→      ) : (
   226→        <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 text-center py-2">No comments yet</p>
   227→      )}
   228→
   229→      {/* New comment input */}
   230→      <div className="border-t border-gray-100 pt-3">
   231→        <Textarea
   232→          value={newComment}
   233→          onChange={(e) => setNewComment(e.target.value)}
   234→          placeholder="Add a comment..."
   235→          className="text-sm min-h-[60px]"
   236→          onKeyDown={(e) => {
   237→            if (e.key === 'Enter' && (e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey)) handleAddComment();
   238→          }}
   239→        />
   240→        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mt-2">
   241→          <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">Cmd+Enter to send</span>
   242→          <Button
   243→            size="sm"
   244→            onClick={() => handleAddComment()}
   245→            disabled={!newComment.trim() || submitting}
   246→            className="h-7 text-xs"
   247→            style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   248→          >
   249→            <Send className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Comment
   250→          </Button>
   251→        </div>
   252→      </div>
   253→    </div>
   254→  );
   255→}
   256→
```

 `./components/tasks/TaskAttachments.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
     4→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     5→import { TaskService, TaskAttachment } from '@/lib/taskService';
     6→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     7→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
     8→import {
     9→  Upload,
    10→  X,
    11→  File,
    12→  Image as ImageIcon,
    13→  FileText,
    14→  Download,
    15→  Trash2,
    16→  Paperclip,
    17→} from 'lucide-react';
    18→
    19→interface TaskAttachmentsProps {
    20→  taskId: string;
    21→  onAttachmentCountChange?: (count: number) => void;
    22→}
    23→
    24→interface UploadingFile {
    25→  file: File;
    26→  progress: number;
    27→  error?: string;
    28→}
    29→
    30→export function TaskAttachments({ taskId, onAttachmentCountChange }: TaskAttachmentsProps) {
    31→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
    32→  const { toast } = useToast();
    33→  const [attachments, setAttachments] = useState<TaskAttachment[]>([]);
    34→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    35→  const [uploadingFiles, setUploadingFiles] = useState<UploadingFile[]>([]);
    36→  const [isDragActive, setIsDragActive] = useState(false);
    37→  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
    38→
    39→  useEffect(() => {
    40→    loadAttachments();
    41→  }, [taskId]);
    42→
    43→  const loadAttachments = async () => {
    44→    try {
    45→      const data = await TaskService.getAttachments(taskId);
    46→      setAttachments(data);
    47→      onAttachmentCountChange?.(data.length);
    48→    } catch {
    49→      // silent
    50→    } finally {
    51→      setLoading(false);
    52→    }
    53→  };
    54→
    55→  const getFileIcon = (mimeType: string | null) => {
    56→    if (!mimeType) return <File className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />;
    57→    if (mimeType.startsWith('image/')) return <ImageIcon className="h-5 w-5 text-blue-500" />;
    58→    if (mimeType.includes('pdf')) return <FileText className="h-5 w-5 text-red-500" />;
    59→    return <File className="h-5 w-5 text-gray-400" />;
    60→  };
    61→
    62→  const formatFileSize = (bytes: number | null) => {
    63→    if (!bytes) return '';
    64→    if (bytes < 1024) return `${bytes} B`;
    65→    if (bytes < 1024 * 1024) return `${(bytes / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`;
    66→    return `${(bytes / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)} MB`;
    67→  };
    68→
    69→  const uploadFile = async (file: File) => {
    70→    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;
    71→
    72→    setUploadingFiles(prev => [...prev, { file, progress: 0 }]);
    73→
    74→    try {
    75→      setUploadingFiles(prev =>
    76→        prev.map(f => f.file === file ? { ...f, progress: 50 } : f)
    77→      );
    78→
    79→      await TaskService.uploadAttachment(
    80→        taskId,
    81→        file,
    82→        user.id,
    83→        userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown'
    84→      );
    85→
    86→      setUploadingFiles(prev =>
    87→        prev.map(f => f.file === file ? { ...f, progress: 100 } : f)
    88→      );
    89→
    90→      setTimeout(() => {
    91→        setUploadingFiles(prev => prev.filter(f => f.file !== file));
    92→      }, 800);
    93→
    94→      await loadAttachments();
    95→    } catch (err: any) {
    96→      setUploadingFiles(prev =>
    97→        prev.map(f => f.file === file ? { ...f, error: err.message || 'Upload failed' } : f)
    98→      );
    99→      toast({ title: 'Upload failed', description: err.message || 'Failed to upload file', variant: 'destructive' });
   100→    }
   101→  };
   102→
   103→  const handleFiles = async (files: FileList | null) => {
   104→    if (!files) return;
   105→    for (let i = 0; i < files.length; i++) {
   106→      await uploadFile(files[i]);
   107→    }
   108→  };
   109→
   110→  const handleDelete = async (attachmentId: string) => {
   111→    try {
   112→      await TaskService.deleteAttachment(attachmentId);
   113→      await loadAttachments();
   114→    } catch {
   115→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to delete attachment.', variant: 'destructive' });
   116→    }
   117→  };
   118→
   119→  const isOwnerOrAdmin = (uploadedBy: string | null) => {
   120→    if (!user?.id) return false;
   121→    if (uploadedBy === user.id) return true;
   122→    return userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin';
   123→  };
   124→
   125→  if (loading) {
   126→    return <div className="text-sm text-gray-400 py-4 text-center">Loading attachments...</div>;
   127→  }
   128→
   129→  return (
   130→    <div className="space-y-3">
   131→      <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   132→        <Paperclip className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
   133→        <h4 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Attachments</h4>
   134→        {attachments.length > 0 && (
   135→          <span className="text-xs bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{attachments.length}</span>
   136→        )}
   137→      </div>
   138→
   139→      {/* Drop zone */}
   140→      <div
   141→        onDragEnter={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); setIsDragActive(true); }}
   142→        onDragLeave={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); setIsDragActive(false); }}
   143→        onDragOver={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); }}
   144→        onDrop={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); e.stopPropagation(); setIsDragActive(false); handleFiles(e.dataTransfer.files); }}
   145→        onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
   146→        className={`border border-dashed rounded-lg p-4 text-center cursor-pointer transition-colors ${
   147→          isDragActive
   148→            ? 'border-[#3e8692] bg-[#3e8692]/5'
   149→            : 'border-gray-200 hover:border-[#3e8692] hover:bg-gray-50'
   150→        }`}
   151→      >
   152→        <input
   153→          ref={fileInputRef}
   154→          type="file"
   155→          multiple
   156→          onChange={(e) => handleFiles(e.target.files)}
   157→          className="hidden"
   158→        />
   159→        <Upload className="h-6 w-6 mx-auto mb-1.5 text-gray-400" />
   160→        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
   161→          {isDragActive ? 'Drop files here...' : 'Drag & drop or click to upload (10MB max)'}
   162→        </p>
   163→      </div>
   164→
   165→      {/* Uploading files */}
   166→      {uploadingFiles.length > 0 && (
   167→        <div className="space-y-1.5">
   168→          {uploadingFiles.map((uf, i) => (
   169→            <div key={i} className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded text-xs">
   170→              {getFileIcon(uf.file.type)}
   171→              <span className="flex-1 truncate">{uf.file.name}</span>
   172→              {uf.error ? (
   173→                <span className="text-red-500">{uf.error}</span>
   174→              ) : (
   175→                <div className="w-16 h-1.5 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   176→                  <div className="h-full transition-all" style={{ width: `${uf.progress}%`, backgroundColor: '#3e8692' }} />
   177→                </div>
   178→              )}
   179→              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-5 w-5 p-0" onClick={() => setUploadingFiles(prev => prev.filter(f => f.file !== uf.file))}>
   180→                <X className="h-3 w-3" />
   181→              </Button>
   182→            </div>
   183→          ))}
   184→        </div>
   185→      )}
   186→
   187→      {/* File list */}
   188→      {attachments.length > 0 && (
   189→        <div className="space-y-1">
   190→          {attachments.map((att) => (
   191→            <div key={att.id} className="flex items-center gap-2 p-2 bg-gray-50 rounded group hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors">
   192→              {getFileIcon(att.mime_type)}
   193→              <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   194→                <p className="text-xs font-medium text-gray-900 truncate">{att.file_name}</p>
   195→                <p className="text-[10px] text-gray-400">
   196→                  {formatFileSize(att.file_size)}
   197→                  {att.uploaded_by_name && ` · ${att.uploaded_by_name}`}
   198→                </p>
   199→              </div>
   200→              <div className="flex gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   201→                <a href={att.file_url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" download>
   202→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 w-6 p-0">
   203→                    <Download className="h-3 w-3 text-gray-500" />
   204→                  </Button>
   205→                </a>
   206→                {isOwnerOrAdmin(att.uploaded_by) && (
   207→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => handleDelete(att.id)}>
   208→                    <Trash2 className="h-3 w-3 text-red-500" />
   209→                  </Button>
   210→                )}
   211→              </div>
   212→            </div>
   213→          ))}
   214→        </div>
   215→      )}
   216→    </div>
   217→  );
   218→}
   219→
```

```text
    45→
    46→export default function AutomationsPage() {
    47→  const { userProfile } = useAuth();
    48→  const { toast } = useToast();
    49→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    50→  const [automations, setAutomations] = useState<TaskAutomation[]>([]);
    51→  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<TaskAutomationLog[]>([]);

    71→  const loadData = async () => {
    72→    try {
    73→      const [automationsData, logsData] = await Promise.all([
    74→        TaskService.getAutomations(),
    75→        TaskService.getAutomationLogs(50),
    76→      ]);
    77→      setAutomations(automationsData);
    78→      setLogs(logsData);
    79→    } catch (err) {
    80→      console.error('Error loading automations:', err);
    81→    } finally {
    82→      setLoading(false);
    83→    }
    84→  };
    85→
    86→  const handleCreate = async () => {
    87→    if (!newRule.name || !newRule.trigger_type || !newRule.action_type) return;
    88→    setCreating(true);
    89→    try {
    90→      await TaskService.createAutomation({
    91→        name: newRule.name,
    92→        trigger_type: newRule.trigger_type,
    93→        trigger_config: newRule.trigger_config,
    94→        action_type: newRule.action_type,
    95→        action_config: newRule.action_config,
    96→        scope: newRule.scope,
    97→        scope_value: newRule.scope_value,
    98→        is_active: true,
    99→        created_by: userProfile?.id || null,
   100→      });
   101→      toast({ title: 'Created', description: 'Automation rule created.' });
   102→      setShowCreateDialog(false);
   103→      setNewRule({
   104→        name: '', trigger_type: '', trigger_config: {},
   105→        action_type: '', action_config: {}, scope: 'global', scope_value: null,
   106→      });
   107→      loadData();
   108→    } catch (err) {
   109→      console.error('Error creating automation:', err);
   110→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to create automation.', variant: 'destructive' });
   111→    } finally {
   112→      setCreating(false);
   113→    }
   114→  };
   115→
   116→  const handleToggle = async (id: string, isActive: boolean) => {
   117→    try {
   118→      await TaskService.updateAutomation(id, { is_active: !isActive });
   119→      setAutomations(prev => prev.map(a => a.id === id ? { ...a, is_active: !isActive } : a));
   120→    } catch (err) {
   121→      console.error('Error toggling automation:', err);
   122→    }
   123→  };
   124→
   125→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   126→    try {
   127→      await TaskService.deleteAutomation(id);
   128→      setAutomations(prev => prev.filter(a => a.id !== id));
   129→      toast({ title: 'Deleted', description: 'Automation rule deleted.' });
   130→    } catch (err) {
   131→      console.error('Error deleting automation:', err);
   132→    }
   133→  };
   134→
   135→  const formatTimeAgo = (dateStr: string) => {
   136→    const diff = Date.now() - new Date(dateStr).getTime();
   137→    const mins = Math.floor(diff / 60000);
   138→    if (mins < 60) return `${mins}m ago`;
   139→    const hours = Math.floor(mins / 60);
   140→    if (hours < 24) return `${hours}h ago`;
   141→    const days = Math.floor(hours / 24);
   142→    return `${days}d ago`;
   143→  };
   144→
   145→  if (!isAdmin) {
   146→    return (
   147→      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
   148→        <div className="text-center">
   149→          <AlertTriangle className="h-12 w-12 text-amber-400 mx-auto mb-3" />
   150→          <p className="text-gray-600">Admin access required.</p>
   151→        </div>
   152→      </div>
   153→    );
   154→  }
   155→
   156→  if (loading) {
   157→    return (
   158→      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 p-6 space-y-4">
   159→        <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64" />
   160→        <div className="grid gap-4">
   161→          {[1, 2, 3].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-20 rounded-lg" />)}
   162→        </div>
   163→      </div>
   164→    );
   165→  }
   166→
   167→  return (
   168→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50">
   169→      <div className="w-full space-y-4">
   170→        {/* Header */}
   171→        <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
   172→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   173→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   174→              <Link href="/tasks">
   175→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
   176→                  <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
   177→                </Button>
   178→              </Link>
   179→              <div className="bg-amber-50 p-2 rounded-lg">
   180→                <Zap className="h-6 w-6 text-amber-600" />
   181→              </div>
   182→              <div>
   183→                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Task Automations</h2>
   184→                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Manage automation rules and view execution history</p>
   185→              </div>
   186→            </div>
   187→            <Button
   188→              onClick={() => setShowCreateDialog(true)}
   189→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   190→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   191→            >
   192→              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> New Rule
   193→            </Button>
   194→          </div>
   195→        </div>
   196→
   197→        {/* Automation Rules */}
   198→        <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
   199→          <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
   200→            <Zap className="h-4 w-4 text-amber-600" />
   201→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Active Rules</h3>
   202→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{automations.length}</Badge>
   203→          </div>
   204→
   205→          {automations.length === 0 ? (
   206→            <div className="p-8 text-center">
   207→              <Zap className="h-10 w-10 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-2" />
   208→              <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">No automation rules yet. Create one to get started.</p>
   209→            </div>
   210→          ) : (
   211→            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
   212→              {automations.map((auto) => (
   213→                <div key={auto.id} className="px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3">
   214→                  <Switch
   215→                    checked={auto.is_active}
   216→                    onCheckedChange={() => handleToggle(auto.id, auto.is_active)}
   217→                  />
   218→                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   219→                    <p className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{auto.name}</p>
   220→                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
   221→                      When: <span className="font-medium">{TRIGGER_TYPES.find(t => t.value === auto.trigger_type)?.label || auto.trigger_type}</span>
   222→                      {' → '}
   223→                      Then: <span className="font-medium">{ACTION_TYPES.find(a => a.value === auto.action_type)?.label || auto.action_type}</span>
   224→                    </p>
   225→                  </div>
   226→                  <Badge variant={auto.is_active ? 'default' : 'secondary'} className="text-xs">
   227→                    {auto.is_active ? 'Active' : 'Paused'}
   228→                  </Badge>
   229→                  <Badge variant="outline" className="text-xs">
   230→                    {SCOPE_OPTIONS.find(s => s.value === auto.scope)?.label || auto.scope}
   231→                  </Badge>
   232→                  <Button
   233→                    variant="ghost"
   234→                    size="sm"
   235→                    className="h-7 w-7 p-0 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500"
   236→                    onClick={() => handleDelete(auto.id)}
   237→                  >
   238→                    <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
   239→                  </Button>
   240→                </div>
   241→              ))}
   242→            </div>
   243→          )}
   244→        </div>
   245→
   246→        {/* Execution Log */}
   247→        <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
   248→          <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
   249→            <Clock className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   250→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Execution Log</h3>
   251→            <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{logs.length}</Badge>
   252→          </div>
   253→
   254→          {logs.length === 0 ? (
   255→            <div className="p-8 text-center">
   256→              <Clock className="h-10 w-10 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-2" />
   257→              <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">No automation executions yet.</p>
   258→            </div>
   259→          ) : (
   260→            <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50 max-h-[400px] overflow-y-auto">
   261→              {logs.map((log) => (
   262→                <div key={log.id} className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-3">
   263→                  {log.action_taken === 'recurring_clone' ? (
   264→                    <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500 flex-shrink-0" />
   265→                  ) : (
   266→                    <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 text-green-500 flex-shrink-0" />
   267→                  )}
   268→                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">
   269→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-900">
   270→                      {log.action_taken === 'recurring_clone' ? 'Recurring task cloned' : log.action_taken}
   271→                    </p>
   272→                    {log.details && (
   273→                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 truncate">
   274→                        {log.details.next_due_date && `Next due: ${log.details.next_due_date}`}
   275→                        {log.details.source_task_id && ` | Source: ${log.details.source_task_id.substring(0, 8)}...`}
   276→                      </p>
   277→                    )}
   278→                  </div>
   279→                  <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{formatTimeAgo(log.executed_at)}</span>
   280→                </div>
   281→              ))}
   282→            </div>
   283→          )}
   284→        </div>
   285→      </div>
   286→
   287→      {/* Create Rule Dialog */}
   288→      <Dialog open={showCreateDialog} onOpenChange={setShowCreateDialog}>
   289→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[500px]">
   290→          <DialogHeader>
   291→            <DialogTitle>Create Automation Rule</DialogTitle>
   292→            <DialogDescription>Set up a new task automation trigger and action.</DialogDescription>
   293→          </DialogHeader>
   294→
   295→          <div className="space-y-4">
   296→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   297→              <Label>Rule Name</Label>
   298→              <Input
   299→                value={newRule.name}
   300→                onChange={(e) => setNewRule({ ...newRule, name: e.target.value })}
   301→                placeholder="e.g., Notify on overdue tasks"
   302→              />
   303→            </div>
   304→
   305→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   306→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   307→                <Label>Trigger</Label>
   308→                <Select value={newRule.trigger_type} onValueChange={(v) => setNewRule({ ...newRule, trigger_type: v })}>
   309→                  <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Select trigger" /></SelectTrigger>
   310→                  <SelectContent>
   311→                    {TRIGGER_TYPES.map(t => (
   312→                      <SelectItem key={t.value} value={t.value}>{t.label}</SelectItem>
   313→                    ))}
   314→                  </SelectContent>
   315→                </Select>
   316→              </div>
   317→
   318→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   319→                <Label>Action</Label>
   320→                <Select value={newRule.action_type} onValueChange={(v) => setNewRule({ ...newRule, action_type: v })}>
   321→                  <SelectTrigger><SelectValue placeholder="Select action" /></SelectTrigger>
   322→                  <SelectContent>
   323→                    {ACTION_TYPES.map(a => (
   324→                      <SelectItem key={a.value} value={a.value}>{a.label}</SelectItem>
   325→                    ))}
   326→                  </SelectContent>
   327→                </Select>
   328→              </div>
   329→            </div>
   330→
   331→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   332→              <Label>Scope</Label>
   333→              <Select value={newRule.scope} onValueChange={(v) => setNewRule({ ...newRule, scope: v })}>
   334→                <SelectTrigger><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
   335→                <SelectContent>
   336→                  {SCOPE_OPTIONS.map(s => (
   337→                    <SelectItem key={s.value} value={s.value}>{s.label}</SelectItem>
   338→                  ))}
   339→                </SelectContent>
   340→              </Select>
   341→            </div>
   342→          </div>
   343→
   344→          <DialogFooter>
   345→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowCreateDialog(false)}>Cancel</Button>
   346→            <Button
   347→              onClick={handleCreate}
   348→              disabled={!newRule.name || !newRule.trigger_type || !newRule.action_type || creating}
   349→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   350→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   351→            >
   352→              {creating ? <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" /> : 'Create Rule'}
   353→            </Button>
   354→          </DialogFooter>
   355→        </DialogContent>
   356→      </Dialog>
   357→    </div>
   358→  );
   359→}
   360→
```

```text
     9→import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';

    11→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
    12→import { TaskService, TaskTemplate } from '@/lib/taskService';
    13→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    14→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    15→import {

    17→  Plus,
    18→  Trash2,
    19→  Copy,
```
