```text
    21→  AlertTriangle,
    22→} from 'lucide-react';
    23→import Link from 'next/link';
    24→
    25→const TASK_TYPES = [
    26→  'Admin & Operations', 'Finance & Invoicing', 'General', 'Tech & Tools',
    27→  'Marketing & Sales', 'Client SOP', 'Client Delivery', 'Performance Review', 'Research & Analytics',
    28→];
    29→const FREQUENCIES = ['one-time', 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'recurring'];
    30→const PRIORITIES = ['low', 'medium', 'high', 'urgent'];
    31→
    32→export default function TemplatesPage() {
    33→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
    34→  const { toast } = useToast();
    35→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    36→  const [templates, setTemplates] = useState<TaskTemplate[]>([]);
    37→  const [showCreateDialog, setShowCreateDialog] = useState(false);
    38→  const [creating, setCreating] = useState(false);
    39→
    40→  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    41→    name: '',
    42→    description: '',
    43→    task_name_template: '',
    44→    task_type: 'General',
    45→    frequency: 'one-time',
    46→    priority: 'medium',
    47→  });
    48→
    49→  const isAdmin = userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin';
    50→
    51→  useEffect(() => {
    52→    loadTemplates();
    53→  }, []);
    54→
    55→  const loadTemplates = async () => {
    56→    try {
    57→      const data = await TaskService.getTemplates();
    58→      setTemplates(data);
    59→    } catch (err) {
    60→      console.error('Error loading templates:', err);
    61→    } finally {
    62→      setLoading(false);
    63→    }
    64→  };
    65→
    66→  const handleCreate = async () => {
    67→    if (!form.name || !form.task_name_template) return;
    68→    setCreating(true);
    69→    try {
    70→      await TaskService.createTemplate({
    71→        name: form.name,
    72→        description: form.description || null,
    73→        task_name_template: form.task_name_template,
    74→        task_type: form.task_type,
    75→        frequency: form.frequency,
    76→        priority: form.priority,
    77→        default_assigned_to: null,
    78→        default_client_id: null,
    79→        recurring_config: null,
    80→        checklist_items: [],
    81→        created_by: user?.id || null,
    82→      });
    83→      toast({ title: 'Created', description: 'Template created successfully.' });
    84→      setShowCreateDialog(false);
    85→      setForm({ name: '', description: '', task_name_template: '', task_type: 'General', frequency: 'one-time', priority: 'medium' });
    86→      loadTemplates();
    87→    } catch (err) {
    88→      console.error('Error creating template:', err);
    89→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to create template.', variant: 'destructive' });
    90→    } finally {
    91→      setCreating(false);
    92→    }
    93→  };

    99→        created_by: user.id,

   101→      });
   102→      if (task) {
   103→        toast({ title: 'Task Created', description: `Created "${task.task_name}" from template.` });
   104→      }
   105→    } catch (err) {
   106→      console.error('Error creating from template:', err);
   107→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to create task from template.', variant: 'destructive' });
   108→    }
   109→  };
   110→
   111→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {

   113→      await TaskService.deleteTemplate(id);
   114→      setTemplates(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));

   116→    } catch (err) {
   117→      console.error('Error deleting template:', err);
   118→    }
   119→  };
   120→
   121→  if (!isAdmin) {
   122→    return (
   123→      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 flex items-center justify-center">
   124→        <div className="text-center">
   125→          <AlertTriangle className="h-12 w-12 text-amber-400 mx-auto mb-3" />
   126→          <p className="text-gray-600">Admin access required.</p>
   127→        </div>
   128→      </div>
   129→    );
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  if (loading) {
   133→    return (
   134→      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 p-6 space-y-4">
   135→        <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64" />
   136→        <div className="grid gap-4">
   137→          {[1, 2, 3].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24 rounded-lg" />)}
   138→        </div>
   139→      </div>
   140→    );
   141→  }
   142→
   143→  return (
   144→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50">
   145→      <div className="w-full space-y-4">
   146→        {/* Header */}
   147→        <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
   148→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   149→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   150→              <Link href="/tasks">
   151→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-8 w-8 p-0">
   152→                  <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
   153→                </Button>
   154→              </Link>
   155→              <div className="bg-violet-50 p-2 rounded-lg">
   156→                <FileText className="h-6 w-6 text-violet-600" />
   157→              </div>
   158→              <div>
   159→                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Task Templates</h2>
   160→                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Reusable task presets for quick creation</p>
   161→              </div>
   162→            </div>
   163→            <Button
   164→              onClick={() => setShowCreateDialog(true)}
   165→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   166→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   167→            >
   168→              <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> New Template
   169→            </Button>

   172→
   173→        {/* Templates List */}
   174→        <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">

   177→            <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Templates</h3>

   179→          </div>
   180→
   181→          {templates.length === 0 ? (

   184→              <p className="text-gray-500 text-sm">No templates yet. Create one or save a task as a template.</p>

   186→          ) : (

   190→                  <div className="flex-1 min-w-0">

   228→          <DialogHeader>
   229→            <DialogTitle>Create Template</DialogTitle>
   230→            <DialogDescription>Create a reusable task template. Use {'{{field_name}}'} placeholders in the task name for dynamic values.</DialogDescription>
   231→          </DialogHeader>
   232→
   233→          <div className="space-y-4">
   234→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   235→              <Label>Template Name</Label>
   236→              <Input
   237→                value={form.name}
   238→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, name: e.target.value })}
   239→                placeholder="e.g., Monthly Client Report"
   240→              />
   241→            </div>
   242→
   243→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   244→              <Label>Task Name Template</Label>
   245→              <Input
   246→                value={form.task_name_template}
   247→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, task_name_template: e.target.value })}
   248→                placeholder="e.g., Prepare {{client_name}} monthly report"
   249→              />
   250→            </div>
   251→
   252→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   253→              <Label>Description</Label>
   254→              <Textarea
   255→                value={form.description}
   256→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, description: e.target.value })}
   257→                placeholder="Optional description..."
   258→                rows={3}
   259→              />
   260→            </div>
   261→
   262→            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-3">
   263→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   264→                <Label className="text-xs">Task Type</Label>
   265→                <Select value={form.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, task_type: v })}>
   266→                  <SelectTrigger className="text-xs"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
   267→                  <SelectContent>
   268→                    {TASK_TYPES.map(t => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   269→                  </SelectContent>
   270→                </Select>
   271→              </div>
   272→
   273→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   274→                <Label className="text-xs">Frequency</Label>
   275→                <Select value={form.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, frequency: v })}>
   276→                  <SelectTrigger className="text-xs"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
   277→                  <SelectContent>
   278→                    {FREQUENCIES.map(f => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{f}</SelectItem>)}
   279→                  </SelectContent>
   280→                </Select>
   281→              </div>
   282→
   283→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   284→                <Label className="text-xs">Priority</Label>
   285→                <Select value={form.priority} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, priority: v })}>
   286→                  <SelectTrigger className="text-xs"><SelectValue /></SelectTrigger>
   287→                  <SelectContent>
   288→                    {PRIORITIES.map(p => <SelectItem key={p} value={p}>{p.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + p.slice(1)}</SelectItem>)}
   289→                  </SelectContent>
   290→                </Select>
   291→              </div>
   292→            </div>
   293→          </div>
   294→
   295→          <DialogFooter>
   296→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setShowCreateDialog(false)}>Cancel</Button>
   297→            <Button
   298→              onClick={handleCreate}
   299→              disabled={!form.name || !form.task_name_template || creating}
   300→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   301→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   302→            >
   303→              {creating ? <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" /> : 'Create Template'}
   304→            </Button>
   305→          </DialogFooter>
   306→        </DialogContent>
   307→      </Dialog>
   308→    </div>
   309→  );
   310→}
   311→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./app/tasks/my-dashboard/page.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     4→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
     5→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
     6→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     7→import { TaskService, Task, DashboardStats } from '@/lib/taskService';
     8→import {
     9→  LayoutDashboard,
    10→  AlertTriangle,
    11→  Clock,
    12→  CheckCircle2,
    13→  PlayCircle,
    14→  Circle,
    15→  PauseCircle,
    16→  MessageCircle,
    17→} from 'lucide-react';
    18→
    19→const STATUS_CONFIG: Record<string, { label: string; icon: typeof Circle; color: string }> = {
    20→  to_do: { label: 'To Do', icon: Circle, color: 'text-gray-400' },
    21→  in_progress: { label: 'In Progress', icon: PlayCircle, color: 'text-blue-500' },
    22→  paused: { label: 'Paused', icon: PauseCircle, color: 'text-amber-500' },
    23→  ready_for_feedback: { label: 'Feedback', icon: MessageCircle, color: 'text-purple-500' },
    24→  complete: { label: 'Complete', icon: CheckCircle2, color: 'text-green-500' },
    25→};
    26→
    27→export default function MyDashboardPage() {
    28→  const { user } = useAuth();
    29→  const [stats, setStats] = useState<DashboardStats | null>(null);
    30→  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
    31→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    32→
    33→  useEffect(() => {
    34→    if (!user?.id) return;
    35→    loadData();
    36→  }, [user?.id]);
    37→
    38→  const loadData = async () => {
    39→    if (!user?.id) return;
    40→    try {
    41→      const [statsData, tasksData] = await Promise.all([
    42→        TaskService.getDashboardStats(user.id),
    43→        TaskService.getTasksForUser(user.id),
    44→      ]);
    45→      setStats(statsData);
    46→      setTasks(tasksData);
    47→    } catch (err) {
    48→      console.error('Error loading dashboard:', err);
    49→    } finally {
    50→      setLoading(false);
    51→    }
    52→  };
    53→
    54→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
    55→  const weekEnd = new Date();
    56→  weekEnd.setDate(weekEnd.getDate() + 7);
    57→  const weekEndStr = weekEnd.toISOString().split('T')[0];
    58→
    59→  const overdueTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.due_date && t.due_date < today && t.status !== 'complete');
    60→  const dueThisWeek = tasks.filter(t => t.due_date && t.due_date >= today && t.due_date <= weekEndStr && t.status !== 'complete');
    61→  const inProgressTasks = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'in_progress');
    62→  const recentlyCompleted = tasks.filter(t => t.status === 'complete').slice(0, 10);
    63→
    64→  const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
    65→    if (!dueDate) return 'text-gray-500';
    66→    if (dueDate < today) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
    67→    const diffDays = Math.ceil((new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00').getTime() - new Date().getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    68→    if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
    69→    return 'text-gray-500';
    70→  };
    71→
    72→  if (loading) {
    73→    return (
    74→      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 p-6">
    75→        <div className="space-y-4">
    76→          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64" />
    77→          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
    78→            {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24 rounded-lg" />)}
    79→          </div>
    80→          <Skeleton className="h-64 rounded-lg" />
    81→        </div>
    82→      </div>
    83→    );
    84→  }
    85→
    86→  return (
    87→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50">
    88→      <div className="w-full">
    89→        <div className="space-y-4">
    90→          {/* Header */}
    91→          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
    92→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    93→              <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
    94→                <LayoutDashboard className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
    95→              </div>
    96→              <div>
    97→                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">My Dashboard</h2>
    98→                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Your assigned tasks and progress</p>
    99→              </div>
   100→            </div>
   101→          </div>
   102→
   103→          {/* Stat Cards */}
   104→          {stats && (
   105→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 gap-4 px-0">
   106→              <StatCard icon={AlertTriangle} label="Overdue" value={stats.overdue} color="text-red-500" bg="bg-red-50" />
   107→              <StatCard icon={Clock} label="Due This Week" value={stats.dueThisWeek} color="text-amber-500" bg="bg-amber-50" />
   108→              <StatCard icon={PlayCircle} label="In Progress" value={stats.inProgress} color="text-blue-500" bg="bg-blue-50" />
   109→              <StatCard icon={CheckCircle2} label="Completed (7d)" value={stats.completedThisWeek} color="text-green-500" bg="bg-green-50" />
   110→            </div>
   111→          )}
   112→
   113→          {/* Overdue Tasks */}
   114→          {overdueTasks.length > 0 && (
   115→            <TaskSection title="Overdue" icon={AlertTriangle} color="text-red-600" tasks={overdueTasks} getDueDateColor={getDueDateColor} />
   116→          )}
   117→
   118→          {/* Due This Week */}
   119→          {dueThisWeek.length > 0 && (
   120→            <TaskSection title="Due This Week" icon={Clock} color="text-amber-600" tasks={dueThisWeek} getDueDateColor={getDueDateColor} />
   121→          )}
   122→
   123→          {/* In Progress */}
   124→          {inProgressTasks.length > 0 && (
   125→            <TaskSection title="In Progress" icon={PlayCircle} color="text-blue-600" tasks={inProgressTasks} getDueDateColor={getDueDateColor} />
   126→          )}
   127→
   128→          {/* Recently Completed */}
   129→          {recentlyCompleted.length > 0 && (
   130→            <TaskSection title="Recently Completed" icon={CheckCircle2} color="text-green-600" tasks={recentlyCompleted} getDueDateColor={getDueDateColor} />
   131→          )}
   132→
   133→          {tasks.length === 0 && (
   134→            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-12 text-center">
   135→              <LayoutDashboard className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
   136→              <p className="text-gray-500">No tasks assigned to you yet.</p>
   137→            </div>
   138→          )}
   139→        </div>
   140→      </div>
   141→    </div>
   142→  );
   143→}
   144→
   145→function StatCard({ icon: Icon, label, value, color, bg }: { icon: any; label: string; value: number; color: string; bg: string }) {
   146→  return (
   147→    <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-4">
   148→      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   149→        <div className={`${bg} p-2 rounded-lg`}>
   150→          <Icon className={`h-5 w-5 ${color}`} />
   151→        </div>
   152→        <div>
   153→          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{value}</p>
   154→          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{label}</p>
   155→        </div>
   156→      </div>
   157→    </div>
   158→  );
   159→}
   160→
   161→function TaskSection({ title, icon: Icon, color, tasks, getDueDateColor }: {
   162→  title: string;
   163→  icon: any;
   164→  color: string;
   165→  tasks: Task[];
   166→  getDueDateColor: (d: string | null) => string;
   167→}) {
   168→  return (
   169→    <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
   170→      <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
   171→        <Icon className={`h-4 w-4 ${color}`} />
   172→        <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">{title}</h3>
   173→        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{tasks.length}</Badge>
   174→      </div>
   175→      <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
   176→        {tasks.map((task) => {
   177→          const cfg = STATUS_CONFIG[task.status] || STATUS_CONFIG.to_do;
   178→          const StatusIcon = cfg.icon;
   179→          return (
   180→            <div key={task.id} className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center gap-3 hover:bg-gray-50">
   181→              <StatusIcon className={`h-4 w-4 ${cfg.color} flex-shrink-0`} />
   182→              <span className={`flex-1 text-sm ${task.status === 'complete' ? 'line-through text-gray-400' : 'text-gray-900'}`}>
   183→                {task.task_name}
   184→              </span>
   185→              {task.due_date && (
   186→                <span className={`text-xs ${getDueDateColor(task.due_date)}`}>
   187→                  {new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
   188→                </span>
   189→              )}
   190→              {task.task_type && (
   191→                <span className="text-[10px] bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">{task.task_type}</span>
   192→              )}
   193→            </div>
   194→          );
   195→        })}
   196→      </div>
   197→    </div>
   198→  );
   199→}
   200→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./app/tasks/admin/page.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     4→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
     5→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
     6→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     7→import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
     8→import { TaskService, DashboardStats } from '@/lib/taskService';
     9→import { ClientService } from '@/lib/clientService';
    10→import {
    11→  ShieldCheck,
    12→  AlertTriangle,
    13→  Clock,
    14→  CheckCircle2,
    15→  PlayCircle,
    16→  Users,
    17→  Building2,
    18→} from 'lucide-react';
    19→
    20→export default function AdminDashboardPage() {
    21→  const { userProfile } = useAuth();
    22→  const router = useRouter();
    23→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    24→  const [overall, setOverall] = useState<DashboardStats | null>(null);
    25→  const [byUser, setByUser] = useState<{ userId: string; userName: string; stats: DashboardStats }[]>([]);
    26→  const [byClient, setByClient] = useState<{ clientId: string; clientName: string; count: number }[]>([]);
    27→
    28→  useEffect(() => {
    29→    if (userProfile && userProfile.role !== 'admin' && userProfile.role !== 'super_admin') {
    30→      router.push('/tasks');
    31→      return;
    32→    }
    33→    loadData();
    34→  }, [userProfile]);
    35→
    36→  const loadData = async () => {
    37→    try {
    38→      const data = await TaskService.getAdminDashboardStats();
    39→      setOverall(data.overall);
    40→      setByUser(data.byUser);
    41→
    42→      // Resolve client names
    43→      const clients = await ClientService.getAllClients();
    44→      const clientMap = new Map(clients.map(c => [c.id, c.name]));
    45→      setByClient(data.byClient.map(bc => ({
    46→        ...bc,
    47→        clientName: clientMap.get(bc.clientId) || 'Unknown',
    48→      })));
    49→    } catch (err) {
    50→      console.error('Error loading admin dashboard:', err);
    51→    } finally {
    52→      setLoading(false);
    53→    }
    54→  };
    55→
    56→  if (loading) {
    57→    return (
    58→      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50 p-6">
    59→        <div className="space-y-4">
    60→          <Skeleton className="h-10 w-64" />
    61→          <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-4">
    62→            {[1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-24 rounded-lg" />)}
    63→          </div>
    64→          <Skeleton className="h-64 rounded-lg" />
    65→        </div>
    66→      </div>
    67→    );
    68→  }
    69→
    70→  return (
    71→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] bg-gray-50">
    72→      <div className="w-full">
    73→        <div className="space-y-4">
    74→          {/* Header */}
    75→          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
    76→            <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
    77→              <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
    78→                <ShieldCheck className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
    79→              </div>
    80→              <div>
    81→                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Admin Overview</h2>
    82→                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Team task overview and workload distribution</p>
    83→              </div>
    84→            </div>
    85→          </div>
    86→
    87→          {/* Overall Stats */}
    88→          {overall && (
    89→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-5 gap-4">
    90→              <StatCard label="Total Tasks" value={overall.total} color="text-gray-600" bg="bg-gray-50" />
    91→              <StatCard label="Overdue" value={overall.overdue} color="text-red-500" bg="bg-red-50" icon={AlertTriangle} />
    92→              <StatCard label="Due This Week" value={overall.dueThisWeek} color="text-amber-500" bg="bg-amber-50" icon={Clock} />
    93→              <StatCard label="In Progress" value={overall.inProgress} color="text-blue-500" bg="bg-blue-50" icon={PlayCircle} />
    94→              <StatCard label="Completed (7d)" value={overall.completedThisWeek} color="text-green-500" bg="bg-green-50" icon={CheckCircle2} />
    95→            </div>
    96→          )}
    97→
    98→          {/* Per Member */}
    99→          <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
   100→            <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
   101→              <Users className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   102→              <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Tasks per Member</h3>
   103→            </div>
   104→            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
   105→              <table className="w-full text-sm">
   106→                <thead>
   107→                  <tr className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50">
   108→                    <th className="text-left py-2 px-4 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Member</th>
   109→                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Total</th>
   110→                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Overdue</th>
   111→                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">In Progress</th>
   112→                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Due Soon</th>
   113→                    <th className="text-center py-2 px-3 font-semibold text-xs text-gray-600 uppercase">Done (7d)</th>
   114→                  </tr>
   115→                </thead>
   116→                <tbody>
   117→                  {byUser.sort((a, b) => b.stats.overdue - a.stats.overdue).map((u) => (
   118→                    <tr key={u.userId} className="border-b border-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-50">
   119→                      <td className="py-2.5 px-4 font-medium text-gray-900">{u.userName}</td>
   120→                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center text-gray-600">{u.stats.total}</td>
   121→                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center">
   122→                        {u.stats.overdue > 0 ? (
   123→                          <Badge variant="destructive" className="text-xs">{u.stats.overdue}</Badge>
   124→                        ) : (
   125→                          <span className="text-gray-400">0</span>
   126→                        )}
   127→                      </td>
   128→                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center text-blue-600">{u.stats.inProgress}</td>
   129→                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center text-amber-600">{u.stats.dueThisWeek}</td>
   130→                      <td className="py-2.5 px-3 text-center text-green-600">{u.stats.completedThisWeek}</td>
   131→                    </tr>
   132→                  ))}
   133→                </tbody>
   134→              </table>
   135→            </div>
   136→          </div>
   137→
   138→          {/* Per Client */}
   139→          {byClient.length > 0 && (
   140→            <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg">
   141→              <div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-gray-100 flex items-center gap-2">
   142→                <Building2 className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   143→                <h3 className="font-semibold text-sm text-gray-900">Tasks per Client</h3>
   144→              </div>
   145→              <div className="divide-y divide-gray-50">
   146→                {byClient.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count).map((c) => (
   147→                  <div
   148→                    key={c.clientId}
   149→                    className="px-4 py-2.5 flex items-center justify-between hover:bg-gray-50 cursor-pointer"
   150→                    onClick={() => router.push(`/tasks/client/${c.clientId}`)}
   151→                  >
   152→                    <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">{c.clientName}</span>
   153→                    <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs">{c.count} tasks</Badge>
   154→                  </div>
   155→                ))}
   156→              </div>
   157→            </div>
   158→          )}
   159→        </div>
   160→      </div>
   161→    </div>
   162→  );
   163→}
   164→
   165→function StatCard({ label, value, color, bg, icon: Icon }: { label: string; value: number; color: string; bg: string; icon?: any }) {
   166→  return (
   167→    <div className="bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg p-4">
   168→      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   169→        {Icon && (
   170→          <div className={`${bg} p-2 rounded-lg`}>
   171→            <Icon className={`h-5 w-5 ${color}`} />
   172→          </div>
   173→        )}
   174→        <div>
   175→          <p className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">{value}</p>
   176→          <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{label}</p>
   177→        </div>
   178→      </div>
   179→    </div>
   180→  );
   181→}
   182→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-17 17:17:49Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a clear picture of all the inconsistencies. Let me catalog them:

**Existing UI patterns (from TaskDetailModal):**
- Inputs: `className="auth-input"`
- SelectTriggers: `className="auth-input"`
- Date picker: Calendar popover with `#3e8692` accent color, CalendarIcon, styled button
- Textareas: `className="auth-input"`
- Primary buttons: `style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}` with `className="hover:opacity-90"`
- Labels: `<Label>` component (no extra className for form labels)


- RecurringConfig.tsx has several deviations: SelectTriggers and Inputs using `h-8 text-xs` instead of the standard `auth-input` class, and the end date field using a native date input rather than the Calendar popover pattern. The automations page also has an Input missing its className entirely.

- Looking at the templates page, I'm seeing Inputs, Textarea, and SelectTriggers that either lack className attributes or use inconsistent styling like `text-xs` instead of `auth-input`. TaskComments.tsx has a similar issue where Textareas are using custom sizing classes instead of the unified `auth-input` class.

- TaskChecklist.tsx and SubtaskList.tsx are intentionally using borderless inline inputs for their edit-in-place functionality, which is the right pattern for that context and doesn't need changing.

- The read-only display pages like My Dashboard, Admin, and Client don't have form inputs, so they're fine as-is. The real inconsistencies I need to fix are in RecurringConfig.tsx, the Automations page, and the Templates page — they all need their SelectTriggers and Inputs updated to use the `auth-input` class, and the end date field in RecurringConfig needs a Calendar popover.

- Since RecurringConfig is nested inside the detail modal with compact sizing, I'll need to be careful about how the Calendar popover scales, but the consistency is worth it. Let me apply all these fixes across the three components now.
</details></think>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
'use client';

import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Calendar } from '@/components/ui/calendar';
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
import { RecurringConfig as RecurringConfigType } from '@/lib/taskService';
import { RefreshCw, X, Calendar as CalendarIcon } from 'lucide-react';

interface RecurringConfigProps {
  value: RecurringConfigType | null;
  onChange: (config: RecurringConfigType | null) => void;
}

const DAYS_OF_WEEK = [
  { value: '0', label: 'Sunday' },
  { value: '1', label: 'Monday' },
  { value: '2', label: 'Tuesday' },
  { value: '3', label: 'Wednesday' },
  { value: '4', label: 'Thursday' },
  { value: '5', label: 'Friday' },
  { value: '6', label: 'Saturday' },
];

export function RecurringConfigEditor({ value, onChange }: RecurringConfigProps) {
  const isEnabled = !!value;

  const enable = () => {
    onChange({ frequency: 'weekly' });
  };

  const disable = () => {
    onChange(null);
  };

  const update = (partial: Partial<RecurringConfigType>) => {
    onChange({ ...value!, ...partial });
  };

  const endDate = value?.end_date ? new Date(value.end_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined;

  if (!isEnabled) {
    return (
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-500" />
          <Label className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">Recurring</Label>
        </div>
        <Button variant="outline" size="sm" className="text-xs" onClick={enable}>
          <RefreshCw className="h-3 w-3 mr-1" /> Enable recurring
        </Button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-3 p-3 bg-blue-50/50 border border-blue-100 rounded-lg">
      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
          <RefreshCw className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" />
          <Label className="text-sm font-semibold text-blue-700">Recurring Task</Label>
        </div>
        <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-6 w-6 p-0 text-gray-400 hover:text-red-500" onClick={disable}>
          <X className="h-3.5 w-3.5" />
        </Button>
      </div>

      <p className="text-xs text-blue-600">When this task is completed, a new instance will be auto-created with the next due date.</p>

      <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
        {/* Frequency */}
        <div className="grid gap-1">
          <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">Frequency</Label>
          <Select value={value.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => update({ frequency: v as any })}>
            <SelectTrigger className="auth-input">
              <SelectValue />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              <SelectItem value="daily">Daily</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="weekly">Weekly</SelectItem>
              <SelectItem value="monthly">Monthly</SelectItem>
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </div>

        {/* Day of week (for weekly) */}
        {value.frequency === 'weekly' && (
          <div className="grid gap-1">
            <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">Day of Week</Label>
            <Select
              value={value.day_of_week?.toString() ?? ''}
              onValueChange={(v) => update({ day_of_week: parseInt(v) })}
            >
              <SelectTrigger className="auth-input">
                <SelectValue placeholder="Any" />
              </SelectTrigger>
              <SelectContent>
                {DAYS_OF_WEEK.map(d => (
                  <SelectItem key={d.value} value={d.value}>{d.label}</SelectItem>
                ))}
              </SelectContent>
            </Select>
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Day of month (for monthly) */}
        {value.frequency === 'monthly' && (
          <div className="grid gap-1">
            <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">Day of Month</Label>
            <Input
              type="number"
              min={1}
              max={31}
              value={value.day_of_month || ''}
              onChange={(e) => update({ day_of_month: parseInt(e.target.value) || undefined })}
              className="auth-input"
              placeholder="1-31"
            />
          </div>
        )}
      </div>

      {/* End date */}
      <div className="grid gap-1">
        <Label className="text-xs text-gray-600">End Date (optional)</Label>
        <Popover>
          <PopoverTrigger asChild>
            <Button
              variant="outline"
              className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal"
              style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: endDate ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
            >
              <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
              {endDate ? endDate.toLocaleDateString() : 'Select end date'}
            </Button>
          </PopoverTrigger>
          <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
            <Calendar
              mode="single"
              selected={endDate}
              onSelect={(date) => {
                if (date) {
                  const year = date.getFullYear();
                  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
                  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
                  update({ end_date: `${year}-${month}-${day}` });
                } else {
                  update({ end_date: undefined });
                }
              }}
              initialFocus
              classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
              modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
            />
          </PopoverContent>
        </Popover>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```
